Name: Alliant Insurance Services
Description:
Alliant Insurance Services is among the top 5 largest and fastest-growing insurance brokerage and consulting firms in the United States. Fueled by entrepreneurialism and driven by results, Alliant operates on the belief that more is possible and expectations are meant to be exceeded. Our clients and partners have profound confidence in us to deliver in all market climates through the design and delivery of innovative solutions and services across a broad range of industry verticals. 

Our people stand as the backbone of our organization. We proudly employ a team of diverse, driven, and exceptional people and invest heavily in their success, giving our brokerage and consulting teams the freedom and resources they need to help their clients grow their businesses to remarkable heights. The result is a dynamic team of professionals who consistently perform at the highest level, while caring and giving back to causes that impact their communities and the world at large.

Alliant is built on teamwork and collaboration, a philosophy that has guided our growth and evolution for 100 years. We rise together to meet challenges, think together to drive innovation, and thrive together in our business and in the diverse communities where we operate.

Name: GoHealth
Description:
At GoHealth, advancing health equity starts with the intentional, data-driven application of proprietary technology, beneficiary and Medicare-expert insight, and an unwavering commitment to delivering peace of mind. With our determined drive to help consumers find a healthcare plan that fits their budget and needs, we believe in hiring risk-takers, innovators, and collaborators within our industry to create individualized, simplified healthcare solutions.

As an industry leader in the Medicare marketplace, we are compelled to not only embrace change but to actively be the change to adapt to our consumers’ complex needs. Our #TeamGoHealth employees are at the core of our collective success; that's why we are committed to discovering the best in-class talent and ensuring that each team member receives the development tools and support they need to flourish in their professional endeavors.

Having a distinctive range of viewpoints, experiences, and background are a large part of what drives success at GoHealth, and we always strive to do more. Our diverse team structures positively affect our relationships with beneficiaries, carriers, and the communities we passionately serve. As our company grows, we will continue to impact change and make a difference to the lives of our customers through the unique perspectives of our people.

GoHealth is a leading health insurance marketplace and Medicare-focused digital health company. Through the efficient, multi-tiered guidance of our highly specialized licensed insurance agents, GoHealth meets Medicare consumers where they are in their enrollment journeys and empowers them to choose the plan and carrier best suited for their healthcare needs. As these needs evolve, GoHealth’s extensive industry expertise, including the use of data science and machine learning with key investments in proprietary technology, serves as a guiding light for Medicare consumers everywhere. 
https://www.gohealth.com/community-guidelines

Alguns exemplos são: Prêmio NTC - 19 vezes eleita a Melhor Corretora de Seguros de Carga, 2 vezes a Melhor Gerenciadora de Riscos e 3 vezes o Melhor Fornecedor do Ano; Prêmio Cobertura Performance - 4 vezes eleita a Melhor Reguladora de Sinistros de Veículos/Cargas, entre outras conquistas.

Name: Gallagher Insurance New Zealand
Description:
We’ve changed our name. Gallagher (formerly Crombie Lockwood) has been arranging insurance cover for New Zealanders since 1978. With over 30 offices around the country, our brokers combine local and industry knowledge with insurance expertise, to keep our clients protected when things go wrong.

Gallagher has been our parent company since 2014 and we are proud to be part of one of the world’s largest insurance brokerage, consulting and risk management firms.

In New Zealand we arrange business, rural, personal and life and health insurance on behalf of around 115,000 clients. 

We are active in caring for our communities and back initiatives that enhance, protect and restore our environment and the things that matter to Kiwis. We are an official partner of Save the Kiwi, a national charity supporting kiwi conservation projects and Principal Partner of Trees for Survival, an environmental educational programme run in schools.

Name: Salasar Services (Insurance Brokers) Private Limited
Description:
Salasar is an insurance and reinsurance broking firm licensed by the Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority (IRDA) vide Licence No. 143 valid up to 3rd April 2027. One of the largest broking firms in India, with a leadership position in the East, we partner with almost all reputed insurance companies in India, both public and private. Our services include Direct Insurance Broking, Reinsurance Broking, Employee Benefits Solutions, Lenders' Insurance Advisory for banks & project finance institutions, and Claims Facilitation.

We provide cost-effective insurance solutions covering assets, liabilities, and specialty risks of large and medium corporations. Appreciating that employees are core to an enterprise, we also have some very process-friendly, needs-driven employee benefits insurance products. Our product range includes Industrial All Risks Policy, Fire & Allied Perils Policy, Project Insurance, Machinery Breakdown Insurance, Boilers & Pressure Plants Insurance, Loss of Profits, Marine Insurance, Personal Accident Insurance, Medical Insurance and Liabilities Insurance. We are privileged to have structured insurance programs for some large corporations in the fields of power, steel, construction, chemicals, sugar, and engineering.

Our highly experienced team of  300+ professionals from the fields of insurance, engineering, finance, business management and IT provide high-quality services to our clients through 18 branches across the country. We take pride in our process-driven capabilities reflected in ISO 9001: 2008 certification of the quality of our processes.

Somos inovadores e empreendedores. Somos ágeis e proativos. Trabalhamos em equipe e celebramos vitórias. Somos claros e transparentes em nossa comunicação. Somos éticos em nossas relações. Exercemos a meritocracia. Respeitamos as diferenças.

Our mission is to deliver a wide spectrum of high-quality insurance services that are both cost-effective and aligned with global best practices.

At the heart of our operations is a team of experienced, driven, and client-focused professionals dedicated to meeting and exceeding the expectations of our valued clients. Through innovation and excellence, we continue to set benchmarks in the insurance brokerage industry.

Our team of experienced insurance professionals span across multiple disciplines to ensure that we continue to provide every customer and partner of Links the best possible solutions. Our extensive experience working with large corporate clients as well as individuals gives us the experience and know-how to solve the most difficult solutions.

Links Insurance Brokers is your link to a secure future.

Customer service oriented (must be a people person)
Results driven, yet humble and coachable
Self-disciplined to work independently
Excellent communication skills

Name: Hindustan Insurance Brokers Ltd.
Description:
We would like to introduce ourselves as the 1st. Direct Insurance Brokers in U.P. having operations in Kanpur & New Delhi since 2003 . Recently start operation at Indore and will shortly be setting up operations in other parts of the country.
Insurance Brokerage is an age old concept in most parts of the world. Infact, 80% of Insurance business is placed through Insurance Brokers worldwide. This concept has been introduced recently in India by Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority (IRDA). An insurance broker is an independent intermediary representing the client and his interests both in Life and General Insurance to all companies operating within India, while an insurance agent / marketing officer represents only a particular Insurance Company.
IRDA follows strict guidelines and a rigid selection process in granting of license to any individual or company to act as an Insurance broker. They look for a professionally run setup, backed by state of the art technology and a positive outlook, for providing excellent services to its clients. The broker has to follow strict guidelines and a Code of Conduct while providing expert advice to its clients in the field of Insurance. All the insurance companies in India have to accept the services provided through a broker.
HIBL is a professional setup, launched by young and energetic individuals, backed by personnel having expert knowledge in insurance related subjects, and proven service industry experience. It strives to be the best in meeting its commitments to its clients.

Name: ISSEO Assurances
Description:
Bienvenue chez ISSEO Assurances, votre courtier dévoué à trouver des solutions d'assurance adaptées aux personnes en situation de handicap moteur. Nous comprenons les défis uniques auxquels sont confrontées les personnes à mobilité réduite, et nous nous engageons à offrir une assistance adaptée pour répondre à leurs besoins en matière d'assurance.

Les statistiques du handicap moteur sont éloquentes. Selon les données les plus récentes, la mobilité réduite concerne environ 3,5 millions de personnes, soit 5,3% de la population. Face à cette réalité, il est essentiel de prendre en compte les problématiques spécifiques auxquelles ces individus sont confrontés au quotidien, y compris en matière d'assurance. 

Nous reconnaissons que l'accès à une assurance adéquate peut être un défi pour les personnes à mobilité réduite. Les compagnies d'assurance traditionnelles peuvent manquer de compréhension et de connaissances pour répondre aux besoins de cette communauté. 

Chez ISSEO Assurance, notre objectif est de proposer des garanties sur mesure qui répondent aux besoins uniques de nos clients. En ce sens, nos assurances prennent en compte l’ensemble des aménagements, des équipements et du matériel liés au handicap. 

Nous sommes là pour vous accompagner à chaque étape du processus de souscription, du choix de vos garanties aux réclamations éventuelles en cas de sinistre. Votre tranquillité d'esprit est notre priorité.


Contactez-nous pour discuter de vos besoins en matière d'assurance et découvrir comment nous pouvons vous aider à protéger et à assurer votre autonomie.

Description:
Alanında Türkiye’nin en büyük dijital sigorta platformlarından biri olan garajsigorta.com.tr bir garaj.com.tr iştirak şirketidir.

garaj.com.tr 30 yıllık tecrübesi ile filo kiralama ve araç satış hizmeti vermek üzere faaliyetlerini sürdürmekte olan bir şirketler grubudur. Bünyenin yeni ve hızlı büyüyen üyesi olan garajsigorta.com.tr Trafik sigortası, Kasko, Sağlık Sigortası, DASK, iş yeri sigortası, seyahat sigortası ve Minik Dostlarımızın sigortası ihtiyaçlarında müşterilerine en iyi ve en uygun sigorta tekliflerini sunmasının yanı sıra profesyonel ekibi ile 7/24 ulaşıma açık müşteri desteği ile müşteri memnuniyetini öncelik edinmiş bir sigorta şirketidir.

Garaj Sigorta dijitalleşen dünyanın bilincinde olup müşterilerinin zamanına saygı ve önem gösterip daha hızlı anlaşılır ve güvenli poliçeler ile hizmet vermeyi bir ilke haline getirmiş ve bununla birlikte dijital dünyanın içerisine hızlı bir şekilde giriş yapmıştır ve hızla büyümeye devam etmektedir.

Müşteri ihtiyaç ve beklentilerini en iyi şekilde analiz ederek, en doğru şekilde en uygun çözüm ve önerilerini sunan, yaygın hizmet ağı ile geniş ürün ve hizmet yelpazesini, en hızlı ve en etkin şekilde ulaştıran, sürdürülebilir ve uzun yıllara dayanan bir kalıcılıkla, müşteri memnuniyetini her şeyden üstün tutan Garaj Sigorta,

Sizlerin sağlığını, yıllar boyunca oluşturdukları varlıklarınızı korumak, hayatınızın tüm evrelerinde sizin ve ailenizin yanında olmak için var.

Guidati dagli agenti Luigi Civra Dano, Federico Civra Dano e Roberto Machetto, ogni giorno ci impegniamo con passione per essere al fianco delle persone, delle famiglie, dei professionisti e delle imprese del nostro territorio.

Crediamo nella consulenza fatta bene, quella che parte dall’ascolto e arriva a costruire insieme un percorso di protezione su misura. Analizziamo i rischi, approfondiamo i bisogni, aiutiamo i nostri clienti a vedere più chiaro nel presente e a programmare il futuro con serenità.

La nostra squadra è composta da consulenti assicurativi preparati e presenti sul territorio, subagenti, dipendenti della compagnia e un team amministrativo sempre pronto a supportare sia i clienti che i colleghi.

Per noi, essere consulenti significa molto più che proporre soluzioni assicurative: significa costruire relazioni di fiducia, educare alla prevenzione, offrire un punto di riferimento concreto nei momenti importanti della vita.

Name: Skjold Forsikring & Pension
Description:
Skjold Forsikringsagentur – Innovation og skræddersyede forsikringsløsninger

Hos Skjold Forsikringsagentur udvikler vi gennemsigtige, fleksible og værdiskabende forsikringsløsninger til det danske erhvervsliv. Vores tilgang er baseret på dyb brancheindsigt, stærk rådgivningserfaring, en analytisk tilgang, data og Business Intelligence, hvor vi tilpasser løsninger til den enkelte kundes behov.

Vi er ikke bundet til ét forsikringsselskab, men samarbejder med en bred vifte af både danske og internationale aktører. Dette giver os frihed til at sammensætte de mest optimale forsikringsrammer for virksomheder på tværs af brancher – som leverandør til SMV’er, industrivirksomheder og forsikringsmæglerbranchen.

Erfaring og indsigt er kernen i vores arbejde. Vi har en stærk rådgivningserfaring fra den danske forsikringssektor og arbejder ud fra en solid forståelse af dataanalyse, produktkendskab, markedsudvikling og forsikringsvilkår. Hvilket gør os i stand til at levere skræddersyede løsninger, der skaber stor værdi for vores kunder.

Når vi sammenligner os med resten af branchen fremhæver vores kunder især lethed, overskuelighed, prissætning og indsigt som kernen i vores løsninger. Vi ved, at forsikring ofte udgør en betydelig del af en virksomheds budget, og derfor arbejder vi målrettet på at sikre, at vores kunder har et klart og gennemsigtigt overblik over deres forsikringsprogram uden de skal have ekstraordinært høje omkostninger til eksterne eller tredjeparts rådgivere. De skal altid kunne se præcis, hvad de er dækket for, hvad de IKKE er dækket for – og hvorfor.

Hos Skjold handler forsikring ikke kun om tryghed, men om at skabe reel værdi gennem erfaring, indsigt og skræddersyede løsninger.

Apostamos al crecimiento constante, con procesos medibles, capacitación continua y herramientas de gestión modernas.

Promovemos un entorno laboral dinámico para nuestros equipos, con objetivos reales, comisiones competitivas y un acompañamiento permanente.

Hoy somos un puente entre las personas y las mejores opciones de salud del mercado. Nuestro compromiso es brindar soluciones reales, confiables y accesibles, generando experiencias positivas tanto para clientes como para colaboradores.

Name: AGASCO
Description:
Pourquoi vos salariés restent chez vous ? Que leur proposez-vous en termes d’avantages sociaux et d’assurances ? Leur niveau de satisfaction ? 

Ces questions sont d’une importance cruciale pour l’avenir de toute entreprise quand on sait que… 

> 83 % des salariés pensent que leur pension de retraite sera insuffisante.
> 70% des entreprises ont déclarées au moins un sinistre (accident du travail) sur un an.
> 70% des entreprises ne sont pas en conformité avec leurs obligations légales

De ces réalités terrains, nous avons créé AGASCO : l’interlocuteur unique des entreprises sur les 5 piliers de la protection sociale collective > la santé, la prévoyance, l’épargne retraite, l’épargne salariale et les indemnités de fin de carrière. 

 Comment ça fonctionne ? 

1 À la suite d’un premier entretien nous réalisons un audit de vos régimes et dispositifs en place, nous analysons les aspects sociaux, fiscaux et juridiques et nous préconisons des solutions sur mesure en lien avec les attentes de l’entreprise, de la direction et des salariés. 
Résultats ? Proposer des solutions d’assurances qui correspondent vraiment aux besoins de vos salariés et optimisation budgétaire. 

2 Nous vous accompagnons ensuite dans le pilotage et la gestion quotidienne des régimes. Nous réalisons une veille juridique et nous restons à vos côtés dans le suivi des dispositifs. 
Résultats ? Mise en conformité de votre entreprise par rapport aux dernières lois. 

 Ce qui nous différencie ? Accompagnement humain de proximité et réactivité du service client. Nous proposons des produits dont vous avez vraiment besoin et pensons avant tout à optimiser vos coûts !

Siamo un’azienda giovane dalle origini antiche, dal 1961 rivolgiamo i nostri sforzi al miglioramento della vita delle persone.
In un mondo sempre più complesso, la nostra capacità di assistere e aiutare le persone, offrendo soluzioni innovative e personalizzate, gli consente di prendere decisioni e crearsi un futuro più sicuro per loro stessi, i loro cari, il loro business.

Vogliamo costruire un rapporto di fiducia e di lungo termine con le persone, siano essi dipendenti, clienti o stakeholder. Valorizziamo le nostre persone, investiamo per favorire l'apprendimento continuo e la crescita professionale, creando un ambiente lavorativo trasparente, collaborativo e accessibile a tutti. La crescita delle nostre persone garantirà il futuro della nostra Compagnia nel lungo termine.

Siamo una compagnia all'avanguardia, per questo adottiamo modalità di lavoro sempre più agili, condivisione delle energie e delle idee, oltre a numerose opportunità di formazione, piani di carriera su misura, una cultura inclusiva e aperta all’innovazione.
Il nostro progetto ambizioso è rendere la nostra agenzia un luogo di crescita, oltreché di lavoro: apprendimento continuo e progresso personale fanno parte del nostro DNA, ogni membro del team è incoraggiato ad ampliare le proprie competenze con il supporto dei nostri Manager.

I nostri valori descrivono ciò che è importante per noi e quello a cui vogliamo attenerci nella nostra attività.
Tutto il nostro lavoro è finalizzato al miglioramento della vita dei nostri clienti. Ci impegniamo con disciplina e integrità per far diventare questa promessa realtà e a lasciare un segno positivo in una relazione di lunga durata.

Name: Ag Generali Torino De Gasperi
Description:
La nostra storia inizia nel 2008, quando due realtà storiche del territorio decidono di unire le forze e dar vita a un nuovo progetto guidato dagli Agenti Mario Badellino e Massimo Penasso.

 Quella scelta è stata molto più di una fusione: è stata l’inizio di un percorso fatto di collaborazione, fiducia reciproca e tanta passione. Anno dopo anno, l’agenzia è cresciuta, diventando un punto di riferimento per tante famiglie e imprese torinesi (e non solo). 

Dal 2018, il testimone passa all’Agente Massimo Penasso, che porta avanti il progetto con la stessa dedizione di sempre, affiancato dalla preziosa collaborazione di Mario Badellino, ancora oggi parte integrante della nostra realtà.

La vera forza dell’agenzia, però, non è solo nella sua storia: è nelle persone che ci lavorano ogni giorno. Un team composto da 10 figure amministrative e 15 consulenti assicurativi, professionisti preparati ma soprattutto vicini alle persone, che ascoltano, comprendono e si impegnano a trovare le soluzioni più adatte per ogni cliente.

→ 150-Day Renewal Orchestration - No fire drills. Strategy starts six months out.

Proven outcomes
Regional insurer: $4.2M coverage secured after initial carrier denial.
MGA: Total loss averted via manuscript restructuring.
Insurtech: Purpose-built AI/algorithmic risk protection where others proposed exclusions.

Who we serve
Regional/mutual insurers, MGAs, and insurtechs buying D&O, E&O/ICPL, Cyber, Crime, and complex P&C programs.

Join 2,000+ financial leaders getting our weekly Boardroom Briefings.

Name: Magellano Insurance Broker
Description:
Benvenuti in Magellano, la tua bussola nel vasto mondo assicurativo dal 2017.

Iscritti regolarmente all’IVASS (Istituto per la Vigilanza sulle Assicurazioni) al numero 45, ti guidiamo attraverso le molteplici sfaccettature delle polizze assicurative, offrendoti una navigazione sicura in un mare di scelte.

A differenza degli agenti assicurativi, non lavoriamo per le compagnie , ma collaboriamo con loro. Questo ci permette di spaziare tra le diverse realtà per selezionare il prodotto migliore per il nostro cliente, garantendo una massima libertà di scelta.

Con più di 50 collaborazioni attive, abbiamo la capacità di esplorare il panorama assicurativo in modo completo per individuare la soluzione più adatta e conveniente per te, senza vincoli o interessi di parte.

Attraverso un’accurata e approfondita analisi delle tue esigenze e grazie alla rete di collaborazioni con le principali imprese di assicurazione, i nostri consulenti sono in grado di proporvi le migliori offerte sul mercato e di reperire soluzioni personalizzate, aggiornate con il mercato attuale per privati, aziende, liberi professionisti o agenzie immobiliari.

I nostri consulenti, non sono solo una bussola che ti guida nella scelta, ma dei fedeli compagni di navigazione, che ti assisteranno in caso di sinistro, occupandosi di sbrigare la relativa burocrazia con il solo e unico scopo di tutelare i tuoi interessi.

Sali a bordo, siamo pronti a tracciare una rotta sicura per il tuo futuro.

Name: Insurance Management Company
Description:
Insurance Management Company (IMC) has earned a national reputation for its unique business model for helping commercial, industrial and institutional clients better manage risk. Clients working closely with our associates, optimize the purchase of property, liability and workers compensation insurance. IMC achieves this through the combination of a uniquely-skilled team and a culture that stresses “what would we do if it were our business”. We believe our approach makes a difference that is valued by our clients.

IMC’s approach is based upon starting with an in-depth understanding of its client’s business and risk profile, and then helping to structure insurance policies that closely reflect the client’s tolerance for risk.  We have an “all hands” meeting daily to review current events, emerging issues, discuss client programs, and brainstorm solutions which allows us to respond quickly, we have a tremendous advantage…and we’ve been doing it that way for 25+ years!

IMC’s service philosophy is to treat our client’s businesses as if they were our own, with the same passion and ongoing attention to detail, not just at renewal time but throughout the year. This is not a “marketing pitch” but, rather, the foundation of our business and the reason why IMC is the only agent in the country to have earned the Quality Award from the Risk and Insurance Management Society (RIMS), the nations largest association of corporate risk managers.

Website: www.imcerie.com

NETIQUETTE
Questa pagina è stata creata per tenervi sempre informati sulle attività dell’Agenzia Generali di Roma Porta Pia.
La netiquette, o galateo di comportamento in Rete, è quell’insieme di regole alla base della partecipazione a progetti digitali come community, forum, chat, social media e user generated content.
Vi chiediamo di rispettare le comuni regole di buona educazione: ci riserviamo di cancellare tutti i contenuti che utilizzino un linguaggio volgare, promuovano attività illegali, violino il diritto d’autore o siano fuori contesto. 
Si evidenzia che questa pagina non è dedicata al servizio Clienti. Per informazioni sulla propria situazione contrattuale si può collegare all’Area Clienti. 
Per reclami o segnalazioni di disservizi riguardanti il rapporto contrattuale o la gestione dei sinistri si può rivolgere all’ufficio Tutela Cliente. 
•	Area Clienti: https://www.generali.it/area-clienti
•	Ufficio Tutela Legale: https://www.generali.it/reclami
Per tutte le controversie che dovessero insorgere, prima di ricorrere all’autorità giudiziaria è possibile avvalersi di sistemi alternativi di risoluzione delle controversie, ai sensi della vigente normativa.

Si ricorda che l’attività svolta dalla nostra agenzia è sottoposta alla vigilanza dell’IVASS

Name: Kinsure
Description:
Kinsure is an innovative insurtech company redefining insurance through technology. Guided by our mission, “Sure to Protect,” we are committed to making insurance smarter, accessible, and more personalized for everyone. At Kinsure, we understand that protecting what matters shouldn’t be complex or overwhelming, which is why we leverage cutting-edge technology to offer seamless and reliable coverage.

Our platform uses advanced data analytics and AI to provide personalized insurance plans, real-time risk management tools, and a streamlined claims process. Whether you're an individual looking for life, health, or property insurance or a business seeking specialized protection, Kinsure ensures that you have the right coverage to match your unique needs.

What Sets Us Apart?
Kinsure’s customer-centric platform offers a simplified, transparent, and efficient experience, allowing users to browse, compare, and manage policies with ease. With instant claims processing, in-app support, and proactive notifications, we take the guesswork out of insurance, empowering customers to make informed decisions effortlessly. Security is also our priority; our system is fortified with the latest security protocols to protect sensitive data.

Our Vision
Kinsure is leading the way toward a future where insurance is seamlessly integrated into daily life. We are focused on creating solutions that adapt to evolving needs and reduce risk through intelligent, proactive coverage. By blending innovation with trust, we provide our customers with peace of mind, ensuring they can live confidently knowing they’re fully protected.

Choose Kinsure for insurance that goes beyond coverage—choose us for assurance, clarity, and a partner dedicated to protecting your future. With Kinsure, you’re not just insured; you’re “Sure to Protect.”

Name: Upper Room Solutions
Description:
Since our start with Colonial Life in 2018, we have become trusted advisors to countless businesses across the United States involving thousands of employees. Over time, we have learned that you need a simple message with a clear value story. Affordable: Save up to 40% monthly on healthcare costs

Flexible: No networks or approvals required to see providers

Accessible: No medical license or state license required to refer or enroll others

Sustainable: Earn upfront commissions and monthly residuals as a consultant

Transparent: Flat monthly rates and easy-to-understand pricing

Mission-Driven: Powered by a non-profit, not by profit margins

For Professionals
If you’re a benefits broker, insurance agent, financial advisor, real estate professional, or entrepreneur, Low Cost Health Cares offers a powerful additional income stream and a meaningful way to serve your existing client base. We provide:

Complete remote training

Proven plug-and-play systems

Residual income through team-building

The ability to start without the burden of a license

We’re actively growing and welcoming both clients and professionals who want to be part of a healthcare revolution.

Name: Mosca
Description:
Um par de olhos multifacetados e muita perspicácia. Com essas características principais e fundamentais nasceu a MOSCA. Desde 2005 o nome desperta curiosidade e a agência promove a inovação.

Contar essa história é quase tão bom quanto conceber uma nova criação. Três cabeças com sonhos e projetos diferentes e que trabalham em vertentes distintas da comunicação um dia resolveram se unir, não para falar a mesma língua, mas para transformar a MOSCA num espaço cosmopolita de ideias.

Os três falam UAI, são apaixonados pelo mineirês e por essa terra inspiradora. Além disso, eles tem em comum a vontade de alçar grandiosos voos. Para isso, selecionaram os melhores talentos e construíram uma estrutura sólida e completa. Hoje a base da agência é Governador Valadares, Minas Gerais, mas as asas batem para longe Brasil afora. Nesses 20 anos o sabor do resultado tem sido melhor que o do pão de queijo, com a projeção e visibilidade dos clientes que nos permitem cuidar de seu maior patrimônio: sua marca.

As garras são fortes e determinadas. A visão apurada se mantém a cada dia mais sólida, focada em criar estratégias e ações ousadas. Esses sentidos e o jeito mosca de ser transformam ideias em diferenciação, a busca em certeza, o cliente em parceiro, um novo projeto num filho, o ato de pensar numa rotina criativa e sem limites. 

Bem-vindo ao nosso habitat, o nosso mundo inventivo!

Description:
Deploying Insurtech to Offer Tailored, Comprehensive Coverage for America's Underserved Drivers. Our mission is to bridge the protection gap for the undocumented Hispanic immigrant community.

Introducing our mobile web application, an innovative platform designed specifically for uninsured drivers in the United States. Engineered with state-of-the-art technology and a range of features tailored to meet the distinctive needs of the uninsured community, we offer competitive rates, swift and dependable service, and a secure environment to secure the most affordable premiums.

Our platform is designed with the user in mind, with an interface that is easily navigable even for those unfamiliar with insurance and technology. We have prioritized accessibility and user experience, making our platform the ideal choice for all underserved drivers.

The Seguro Amigo App will also facilitate easy access to federal and state government agencies that aid immigrants. Users can swiftly navigate to relevant federal agencies like Citizenship and Immigration Services, Immigration and Customs Enforcement, Department of Homeland Security, and U.S. Visas. State-specific information, such as driver's license requirements and resources for other forms of identification, is also readily accessible.

Additionally, our application will provide comprehensive resources for local legal services, auto financing options, refinancing, personal loans, and consumer financing. We are striving to efficiently connect users with trusted legal services, access financial resources, and secure the best loan terms available. We take pride in offering dynamic, user-friendly features that ensure our customers' financial security and success.

We are continuously seeking passionate and experienced professionals to join our growing team. If you are excited about innovative technology, have a passion for assisting underserved demographics, you can contact us via email at info@seguroamigo.app

Description:
At Solution Health Cares, we’re leading the movement to make healthcare work for real people—not insurance companies.

For too long, Americans have been forced to pay high premiums for health insurance that’s filled with red tape, limited doctor access, and surprise bills. We're changing that.

Our mission is simple: cut out the middleman and connect people directly with the care they need. By removing insurance companies from the equation, we help individuals, families, and small businesses get comprehensive healthcare coverage at a fraction of the cost—with an average savings of 40%.

 Why Solution Health Cares?
With Solution Health Cares, you’re in control of your care and your costs.
Whether you're a single professional, growing family, or small business owner, our plans are designed to give you flexibility, value, and peace of mind.

Family pricing starts as low as $489/month—for full, nationwide coverage that’s simple to use and powerful in value.

 What Makes Us Different:
Direct Provider Payments
No insurance companies involved. Your monthly contributions go directly toward paying your medical bills and supporting others in the program.

No Networks
See any doctor, hospital, or specialist you choose. No gatekeeping, no restrictions.

No Open Enrollment Windows
Join at any time of year. Your coverage begins on the first of the next month.

FREE 24/7 Telemedicine
Access licensed physicians anytime, from anywhere—at no additional cost.

FREE Annual Wellness Checks
Stay proactive with your health through fully covered wellness visits.

Dental & Vision Discounts
Deeper savings without hidden fees, waiting periods, or confusing fine print.

Health & Wellness Credits
Get up to $100/month to spend on services or programs that improve your well-being—from fitness and nutrition to stress management and more.

Lowest Prescription Prices
Our smart AI tool scans local pharmacies to find the lowest price for your medication.

Name: Associazione Agenti Allianz
Description:
L’Associazione Agenti Allianz nasce dalla integrazione di GALA, GNA, e UIA, gli storici Gruppi degli Agenti Lloyd Adriatico, Allianz Subalpina e Ras.

Consapevoli che, per affrontare al meglio i repentini cambiamenti del mercato assicurativo italiano, era necessario condividere obiettivi e strategie, i Vertici dei tre Gruppi storici hanno affrontato la difficile sfida della unificazione.

Oggi, definiti gli aspetti formali, atti notarili, statuto e regolamento, stiamo gestendo, con equilibrio e pazienza, quella fase transitoria indispensabile ad unificare e ad amalgamare efficacemente l’operatività dell’Associazione.

Avere costituito un unico soggetto di rappresentanza, a cui sono iscritti la pressoché totalità degli Agenti Allianz, ha rafforzato l’autorevolezza dell’Associazione, con unanimi riconoscimenti a cominciare dalla stessa Allianz.

E se oggi rappresentiamo il più numeroso Gruppo Agenti italiano, con oltre 2000 Associati, puntiamo a diventare in futuro punto di riferimento per la categoria degli Agenti di assicurazione.

Di fronte alla crisi generale delle rappresentanze, la cui frammentazione è la diretta conseguenza, aver puntato alla unità, costituisce un passo significativo su cui costruire il futuro della nostra Associazione.

Si informa che il contraente ha la facoltà dal 15 gennaio 2026 di presentare ricorso all’Arbitro Assicurativo (www.arbitroassicurativo.org) ovvero di avvalersi di altri eventuali sistemi alternativi di risoluzione delle controversie previsti dalla normativa vigente indicati nei DIP aggiuntivi.

Müşterilerimizin hem bugününü hem de yarınını güvence altına alan sigorta ve emeklilik çözümleri sunarak finansal huzur ve güven sağlamaktır.

Sigorta ve finansal danışmanlık alanında yenilikçi, güvenilir ve müşteri odaklı hizmetleriyle öne çıkan lider bir marka olmak.

Name: Claude & Charme Corredora de Seguros SpA
Description:
Brindamos soluciones de seguros personalizadas y confiables que protejan y respalden a nuestros clientes en cada etapa de sus vidas. Nos comprometemos a ofrecer una asesoría experta.

Seguros Generales:

1. Seguro Automotriz
Protege tu vehículo ante daños propios, robos, accidentes o terceros afectados. Incluye coberturas de responsabilidad civil y asistencias en ruta.

2. Seguro de Hogar
Resguarda tu casa y su contenido frente a riesgos como incendios, robos, daños por agua o desastres naturales. Ideal para propietarios e inquilinos.

3. Seguro contra Sismos
Diseñado especialmente para proteger inmuebles en un país altamente sísmico como Chile. Cubre reparaciones o reconstrucciones tras un terremoto.

4. Seguro de Viajes
Ofrece asistencia médica, cobertura en casos de pérdida de equipaje o cancelación de vuelos. Una tranquilidad imprescindible para viajar al extranjero.

5. Seguro de Responsabilidad Civil
Protege a individuos o empresas ante daños ocasionados a terceros, ya sea en bienes o personas, por accidentes imprevistos.

6. Seguro para Empresas
Cobertura integral para negocios, que incluye protección para instalaciones, maquinaria, inventarios y responsabilidad civil empresarial.

Seguros de Vida:

1. Seguro de Vida
Brinda apoyo financiero a los familiares o dependientes del asegurado para protegerlos frente a las consecuencias económicas derivadas de su ausencia.

2. Seguro de Salud Complementario
Brinda respaldo para cubrir diferencias no reembolsadas por sistemas de salud como Isapre o Fonasa, asegurando acceso a mejores servicios médicos.

3. Seguro Catastrófico
Diseñado para cubrir gastos médicos elevados asociados a enfermedades graves o tratamientos de alto costo, que pueden representar un impacto significativo en el presupuesto familiar.

4. Seguro de Accidentes Personales
Proporciona una indemnización en caso de lesiones, discapacidad o muerte accidental, tanto dentro como fuera del trabajo.

EUROPE HOLDINGS was created by the merger of KLM S.A and INTRACOM PROPERTIES, two companies with a significant real estate portfolio. 
The company's journey began in 1986 with the establishment of Ioannis Kloukinas - Ioannis Lappas Technical and Commercial Building Materials - Machinery SA, which through acquisitions and mergers evolved into KLM S.A and was listed on the Athens Stock Exchange in 2004.

In 2024, KLM S.A merged with INTRACOM PROPERTIES, a subsidiary of INTRACOM HOLDINGS and was renamed EUROPE HOLDINGS and remains listed on the main market of the Athens Stock Exchange.

EUROPE HOLDINGS A.E. is a member of the INTRACOM Group. INTRACOM was founded in 1977 by its President Mr. Sokratis Kokkalis and quickly developed into a leading group in Greece with a strong international presence and export activity. It is gradually evolving into an investment company aiming to achieve high returns, offering greater value to its shareholders over time.

✓ CVC Compliance: All operations follow Central Vigilance Commission guidelines ensuring transparency and accountability

Insurance Companies | Banking & Finance | Manufacturing | Transportation & Logistics | Government Agencies | Educational Institutions | Healthcare Organizations

Name: Promantis Conseil
Description:
Entité du Groupe Alptis créée en 2025, Promantis Conseil est un réseau d’experts en assurance destiné aux TNS, TPE, artisans, commerçants et professions libérales. Il repose sur un modèle innovant : permettre à des personnes issues de l’assurance de se former, d’exercer et, à terme, de devenir courtiers indépendants sous la marque Promantis Conseil.

Notre mission est double :
- Former et accompagner celles et ceux qui souhaitent devenir mandataires experts en assurance, puis courtiers en assurance, dans un cadre certifié et sécurisant, avec des outils performants et un soutien personnalisé.
- Offrir aux pros et TNS des solutions d’assurance sur-mesure (santé, prévoyance, vie, retraite, IARD Pro) avec un accompagnement de proximité.

Avec Promantis Conseil, nous proposons bien plus qu’un réseau de distribution : c’est une vraie rampe de lancement vers le métier de courtier indépendant que le Groupe Alptis est fier de soutenir.

Avec la volonté d’apporter aux experts mandataires membres du réseau Promantis Conseil un accompagnement qui conjugue expertise et qualité de service au service des professionnels.

Name: Pelican Insured
Description:
Welcome to our vibrant and dynamic insurance brokerage!  We are a fresh and energetic team dedicated to providing exceptional business insurance solutions while prioritising the needs and success of our valued clients. At Pelican, we believe in fostering long-lasting professional relationships built on trust, integrity, and personalised service.

With years of experience in the insurance industry, our team understands the unique challenges faced by businesses today. We specialise in offering comprehensive business insurance coverage tailored to your specific industry, size, and risk profile. Whether you're a small startup, a growing mid-sized company, or an established enterprise, we have the expertise to assess your needs and provide customised solutions that protect your assets, employees, and operations.

What sets us apart is our unwavering commitment to exemplary customer service. We go above and beyond to understand the intricacies of your business and its risks. Our dedicated professionals take the time to listen, analyze, and develop insurance strategies that align with your objectives. We believe in being proactive, ensuring you have the right coverage in place to mitigate potential risks and safeguard your business's continuity.

But our relationship with you doesn't end with the policy purchase. We view ourselves as your trusted insurance partner, ready to assist you throughout the policy lifecycle. We conduct regular policy reviews, staying attuned to any changes in your business and industry landscape. Our goal is to keep you informed about emerging risks, industry trends, and regulatory updates that may impact your insurance needs. We are here to provide guidance and support, ensuring your business remains protected and resilient in the face of uncertainties.

Discover a refreshing approach to business insurance with Pelican - where caring for our clients and cultivating long-lasting professional relationships are at the heart of everything we do.

Name: wiispa
Description:
Insurance is a powerful tool to help businesses manage risk, but too often businesses can feel frustrated that insurance is difficult to understand and do not trust that it will respond in the event of a claim. At Wiispa we are on journey to fix this using our Wiispa Risk Wrapper.
 
At Wiispa we look at insurance through the lens of Mergers and Acquisitions, where the popularity of Warranty and Indemnity insurance has boomed in recent years. This looks at all liabilities of a business at the point at which it is being sold. Warranty and Indemnity insurance is often purchased with certain Contingent Risk insurance products which address known risks. This is where we excel and where we have a long history of dealing with complex deals in compressed timelines. Outside of deals there is a world of General Insurance that we believe can be better understood and improved using the principles applied on M&A deals.

Using the Wiispa Risk Wrapper, we view the three layers of insurance: warranty and indemnity insurance, contingent risk insurance and General Insurance relative to the business as a whole. We want to give a complete understanding of insurance so that businesses know how it applies. We Map out understanding of the business. We Clarify risks. We Cover with insurance. We assist with Claims.

Our teams are based across London and Manchester, and we place policies throughout the UK and Europe. We believe that the next stage of development of Transactional Risk and General Insurance is that they become more closely knitted together. Wiispa provides the platform to combine the expertise in M&A and the intellectual curiosity to push the world of General Insurance.

Créé dans les années 2010, notre cabinet de conseil s’est spécialisé dans le courtage en assurance. Dans un monde de plus en plus libéral, ce secteur est en perpétuel développement, et Anavie, plus que les autres, veille à rester au fait des changements qui pourraient vous impacter.
En un mot, nous sommes là pour anticiper, prévoir, et ainsi vous apporter des réponses ajustées à vos besoins et votre budget.

Anavie est particulièrement reconnu pour son expertise dans les métiers de la santé : nous couvrons plus de 43 professions médicales et paramédicales. De ce fait, nous sommes les plus appropriés pour analyser et proposer des solutions aux risques spécifiques de ce corps de métier. De la retraite à la protection juridique, nos conseillers offrent des bilans patrimoniaux gratuits, et adaptent ensuite leurs recommandations. Anavie compte aujourd’hui plus de 11 000 clients, suivis “sur-mesure”.

Nous savons que l’essentiel dans notre monde aujourd’hui, c’est le lien. C’est pourquoi Anavie est présent et opère sur tout le territoire, de Paris à Montpellier sans oublier les DOM-TOM. Nos quelque 200 collaborateurs, soigneusement choisis et formés à la gestion d’actifs, sont prêts à répondre à toutes vos demandes en ligne, et se montrent toujours disposés à vous rencontrer !

Notre vision pour l’avenir ? Construire un cabinet à la fois moderne et humain, où la digitalisation va de pair avec l’accompagnement personnalisé. Concernés par les préoccupations des français, transformons ensemble l'épargne en levier d’impact avec un engagement croissant dans les fonds verts, sans jamais sacrifier votre sécurité. Le futur se prépare aujourd’hui, avec vos ambitions comme boussole et notre expertise comme garantie.

Name: NSW Workers Compensation Self Insurers Association
Description:
About The NSW Self Insurers’ Association

The New South Wales Workers Compensation Self Insurers Association Incorporated is a non profit association of NSW Employers who are licenced to manage their own risk for workers compensation. The Association commenced in 1979 and has grown to have a membership of 62 full member companies, 6 associate members and 24 provisional members. 

In all the Association respresents a very large number of businesses varying in size from national multi-state employers to single state entities. Many of our member are top ASX listed companies and employ workers in a range of different Industry Sectors. Also included through legislation (WCA 211B) as a Deemed Self Insurer, is the State’s Treasury Managed Fund, whose state public entities are not able to self manage their claims, but come under Scheme Agent management.
Section 211 of the Workers Compenation Act 1987 allows the Authority (SIRA) to grant a self insurance licence.  This licensing requires substantial prudential requirements and securities to safeguard the liability from adverse circumstances.

Self and Specialised Insurers possess an intimate understanding of the true risks and cost drivers involved in workers compensation as they are responsible for both direct and indirect costs associated with the management of their own workers compensation risks.

Unlike Scheme Agents who are influenced by remuneration.  Self and Specialised Insurers have their Company and Workers’ best interests at heart.  The ownership of performance and cost rests with the Self and Specialised Insurer who manage their workers compensation risk with the best possible resources, normally experienced in-house staff.

It is hoped that you will benefit from using our website and any feedback is welcome to info@nswselfinsurers.com.au  

Privacy Statement: This Association respects your privacy and does not release personal details outside the membership.

Name: Victoria Healthcare Management
Description:
We, Victoria Healthcare Management are an independent and experienced brokers, specialising in Private Medical Insurance (PMI) for individuals and companies across the country.

We thrive on customer service and each client, regardless of size, receives the same high standard we like to deliver.

We work with all the major and some of the smaller insurers and review our clients policies year on year, which also includes negotiating with the existing provider to ensure each client receives the most cost effective premium available to them.

Our office is based in Eastbourne, East Sussex, but we have clients based all across the country.

We provide a concierge service to our clients which includes a complimentary claims management service.  

At times we will also visit clients with the insurers to present to companies and their employees on how to utilise their cover and the value added services included.

We do not charge a fee for our service as we will receive some renumeration from the insurer.  This does not affect the amount a client will pay.

We are a close team with all the same work ethics which is essentially to help individuals and companies to save money, time and have a real understanding of their health policy, which has been tailored to best meet their needs.

Do contact us with any questions whether you're new to market, have a policy you would like reviewing or just want to understand a bit more about our independent specialist service, we are always happy to help!

Name: SLIBA -Sri Lanka Insurance Brokers Association
Description:
The Sri Lanka Insurance Brokers Association (SLIBA) is the central organization for all registered insurance brokers in Sri Lanka. SLIBA is involved with elevating the status of its membership, safeguarding and advancing their interests whilst enhancing their general efficiency, technical knowledge and professional conduct. The organization aims to foster a class of insurance intermediaries who are technically competent, professional in their outlook and conduct, which the insuring public can depend on in accessing truly independent and expert insurance services and advice.
Among the objectives of SLIBA is the training and education of insurance brokers, to scrutinize legislation which effects the operations of the insurance industry, to act as an arbitrator between Members on disputes relating to the practice of insurance and to shape future positive development of the industry and SLIBA.
Membership in SLIBA is mandatory for the granting and the annual renewal of the license given to members by the Insurance Board of Sri Lanka which governs and regulates the industry.

Name: Gemaway Seguros
Description:
Engenharia de Garantias e Inteligência de Capital

A Gemaway Seguros é uma consultoria estratégica de nicho, operando na interseção entre a engenharia contratual e a eficiência financeira. Redefinimos o papel do Seguro Garantia: ele deixa de ser um custo acessório para se tornar um instrumento de governança e alavancagem operacional.

Nossa Proposta de Valor: Mitigamos a imobilização de capital de giro. Substituímos retenções de pagamento e fianças bancárias onerosas por apólices técnicas de alta aceitação, preservando o limite de crédito (Bankline) e o fluxo de caixa para a atividade-fim de nossos clientes.

Frentes de Atuação:

Infraestrutura e Indústria: Estruturação de Bid e Performance Bonds sob a ótica da Lei 14.133/21.

Otimização de Passivos: Seguro Garantia Judicial (Cível, Trabalhista e Fiscal) para liberação imediata de depósitos e ativos penhorados.

Risk Advisory: Análise técnica de editais e minutas para garantir a exequibilidade e a segurança jurídica de grandes projetos.

Na Gemaway, não emitimos apenas apólices; viabilizamos a capacidade de execução de grandes players nacionais.

Gemaway Seguros | Inteligência em Garantias

Name: Gemaway Seguros
Description:
Engenharia de Garantias e Inteligência de Capital

A Gemaway Seguros atua como uma consultoria estratégica especializada em Seguro Garantia e Riscos de Engenharia, operando na interseção entre a engenharia contratual e a eficiência financeira.

Nossa tese de atuação distancia-se do modelo tradicional de corretagem. Compreendemos o Seguro Garantia não como um produto securitário padronizado, mas como um instrumento fundamental de governança corporativa e gestão de liquidez para empresas de Infraestrutura, Construção e Indústria.

O foco central da nossa operação é mitigar a imobilização de capital. Atuamos para substituir retenções financeiras e garantias bancárias onerosas por apólices técnicas, preservando o fluxo de caixa e os limites de crédito bancário de nossos clientes para a atividade fim.

Competências Nucleares:

• Estruturação de Garantias em Licitações: Emissão técnica de Bid Bonds e Performance Bonds para contratos públicos e privados de alta complexidade.

• Gestão de Passivos Judiciais: Utilização de Seguro Garantia Judicial (Cível, Trabalhista e Fiscal) como ferramenta de preservação de caixa.

• Consultoria de Riscos Contratuais: Análise preventiva de editais e minutas para assegurar a solvência e a exequibilidade das garantias.

Não vendemos apenas apólices; entregamos capacidade de execução e segurança jurídica para grandes projetos.

Gemaway Seguros | Inteligência em Garantias www.gemaway.com.br

Name: Sell What Sells
Description:
**Impact Health Sharing: Overview**

Impact Health Sharing is a non-profit organization offering a health sharing program as an affordable, community-driven alternative to traditional health insurance. Founded with the mission to revolutionize healthcare costs, it operates on mutual aid principles, with members contributing to a common fund used for eligible medical expenses. The organization has maintained a 98% client retention rate since 2020.

**Membership and Plans**

Membership is available to individuals, families, and businesses. Members contribute a fixed monthly share pooled to pay for medical expenses. Plans vary to meet different healthcare needs:

- **Basic Plan:** Covers essential medical needs.
- **Standard Plan:** Includes preventive care and specialist visits.
- **Comprehensive Plan:** Covers hospitalization and major surgeries.
- **Premium Plan:** Offers extensive coverage for significant healthcare needs.

**Eligibility and Claims**

Members must adhere to healthy lifestyles, with specific guidelines for pre-existing conditions. The claims process is straightforward: members submit claims for eligible expenses, reviewed and disbursed from pooled funds. An online portal allows members to track claim status.

**Transparency and Community**

Financial transparency is a core principle, with regular updates on fund utilization and accessible financial statements. The community aspect is emphasized through member engagement, emotional support, and educational events.

**Technology and Future Goals**

An intuitive online platform allows easy account management, claim submissions, and access to health resources. Impact Health Sharing aims to expand its membership, introduce new plans, and enhance partnerships with healthcare providers, increasing awareness of health sharing as a viable insurance alternative.

Name: Healthcare Solutions Hub
Description:
Healthcare Solutions is a modern alternative to traditional health insurance, designed to help individuals, families, and small businesses take control of their healthcare costs without sacrificing coverage. As a non-profit organization, Healthcare Solutions operates on a membership-based model, where members share in one another’s medical expenses. This approach allows for an average savings of 40% compared to traditional health insurance plans—without compromising access to quality care.

Members of Healthcare Solutions enjoy the freedom to visit any provider nationwide—there are no network restrictions—giving them greater flexibility and choice when it comes to their healthcare. The platform offers comprehensive features including annual physicals, preventive care, telemedicine, maternity support, mental health services, and access to major medical procedures, all integrated under a simplified cost-sharing structure.

One of the most appealing aspects of Healthcare Solutions is its straightforward, transparent pricing. There are no hidden fees or surprise bills. Members choose a Monthly Share Amount (similar to a premium) and an Annual Household Portion (similar to a deductible), and once the Annual Portion is met, all eligible medical expenses are shareable.

The program is open to the self-employed, independent contractors, small business owners, and anyone looking for affordable, effective healthcare without the burden of traditional insurance bureaucracy. And because no insurance license is required to refer others to Healthcare Solutions, it's also a powerful opportunity for individuals and organizations looking to grow residual income by offering a solution that meets real-world needs.

With a 98% member retention rate since 2020, Healthcare Solutions stands as a trusted, high-value option in today’s healthcare landscape.

No Networks: You’re free to choose any doctor or hospital you prefer—no restrictions, no referrals needed.

Fast Activation: Enroll today and your coverage begins the 1st of the next month.

Solution Healthcare is here to simplify healthcare, lower costs, and give you the freedom to take control of your health—without compromise.

Name: Healthcare Helper
Description:
Impact Health Sharing is a non-profit, membership-based alternative to traditional health insurance that empowers individuals, families, and small businesses to take control of their healthcare costs—without sacrificing quality or flexibility. Designed to offer significant savings and transparency, Impact provides a modern approach to managing medical expenses through a structured health sharing model.

Members of Impact Health Sharing contribute a Monthly Share amount, which goes toward covering eligible medical bills within the community. Once a household meets their Annual Household Portion (similar to a deductible), additional qualified medical expenses are shared by other members. This system delivers an average savings of 40% compared to traditional health insurance, while still providing access to high-quality care.

Impact does not operate within a provider network, giving members the freedom to see any doctor or specialist nationwide. Services include access to preventive care, telemedicine, maternity care, mental health resources, prescription discounts, and major medical procedures. All of this is offered through a clear, upfront pricing structure—eliminating surprise bills and unnecessary complexity.

Ideal for independent contractors, small business owners, entrepreneurs, and families seeking affordable healthcare options, Impact Health Sharing removes the red tape and high costs often associated with insurance. It’s not only a smarter financial solution, but also an opportunity to be part of a community-focused system that puts people first.

And with no license required to share the program with others, Impact also presents a powerful opportunity to earn ongoing, residual income while helping others save significantly on healthcare.

Since launching in 2020, Impact Health Sharing has maintained a 98% retention rate—proving that when healthcare is affordable, flexible, and transparent, people stay committed.

De una manera fácil, conocerás como identificar y cuantificar ordenadamente los riesgos que tienen mayor impacto sobre el éxito o no de tu actividad empresarial (intensidad) y la mayor probabilidad de ocurrencia (frecuencia), y así poder tomar decisiones óptimas para controlar y minimizar riesgos, a través de controles internos y/o transfiriendo los riesgos a compañías aseguradoras.
Por este servicio se cobran honorarios en función del volumen total de primas del programa de seguros.

 AUDITORIA DEL PROGRAMA DE SEGUROS
Analizamos las garantías contratadas y la redacción del condicionado general de todas tus pólizas de seguros, detectamos carencias, proponemos nuevas coberturas, sumas aseguradas, valoramos franquicias, y analizamos el coste de su programa con el fin de conseguir las primas más competitivas.
Por este servicio no se cobran honorarios. Nuestra remuneración viene vía comisión que abona directamente el asegurador, siempre y cuando el cliente nos haya nombrado broker del programa de seguros

Name: Magyar Biztosítási Tanácsadók Szövetsége
Description:
Küldetésünk

Tagjaink érdekképviselete révén katalizátora kívánunk lenni a hazai biztosítási szektor fejlődésének, melynek érdekében összekötő kapocsként aktív párbeszédet folytatunk a szabályozói szervekkel és szakmai közösségekkel. Küldetésünk, hogy szakértői tudásunkkal és tagjaink együttműködése által segítsünk közelebb vinni az emberekhez a biztosításokat, hogy képesek legyenek tudatos döntéseket hozni biztosításaik terén. 

Célkitűzésünk, hogy tagjaink érdekképviselete által magasabb szintre emeljük a biztosítási szakmát Magyarországon, egyben segítsük a fiatal tehetségek bevonzását, mely hozzájárul a közvetítői létszám növekedéséhez. Kiemelten törekszünk rá, hogy olyan szakmai alapokon nyugvó, szoros együttműködést alakítsunk ki a biztosítási szektoron belüli szövetségekkel, amely egységgé kovácsolja a jelenleg szigetenként működő szervezeteket.

Description:
The Praschan Agency at InsuraTec is a dedicated and customer-focused firm specializing in the realm of life insurance sales. As expert life insurance agents, we take pride in helping individuals and families secure their financial future through personalized insurance solutions.

Our agency operates within the framework of InsuraTec, a reputable organization known for its commitment to excellence and integrity in the insurance industry. With a wealth of knowledge and experience, our team at The Praschan Agency strives to provide comprehensive life insurance services tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients.

At the heart of our operation is a genuine passion for assisting clients in understanding the importance of life insurance and guiding them through the process of selecting the most suitable coverage. We recognize the significance of life insurance in safeguarding loved ones and ensuring peace of mind amidst life's uncertainties.

As a dedicated life insurance brokerage, we offer a wide array of insurance products and policies, allowing our clients to choose options that align with their financial goals and aspirations. Whether it's term life insurance, whole life insurance, or universal life insurance, our agents are adept at explaining the intricacies of each policy, empowering clients to make informed decisions.

What sets The Praschan Agency apart is our commitment to exceptional customer service. We prioritize building strong, long-lasting relationships with our clients, based on trust, transparency, and reliability. Our agents are not just salespeople; they are knowledgeable advisors who listen to your concerns, assess your needs, and work tirelessly to find the best life insurance solutions for you and your family.

Name: Assilease Sas Assicurazioni
Description:
Dal 1991 operiamo nei settori della consulenza e mediazione di soluzioni assicurative e nella gestione del rischio.
Siamo specialisti in tema di analisi dei tuoi bisogni assicurativi, offerta, vendita e post-vendita. Il nostro impegno è quello di sviluppare e innovare, ogni giorno, le nostre competenze per proporre nuove soluzioni con l’obiettivo di soddisfare al meglio i bisogni della clientela.
Ciò che contraddistingue la nostra storia, ormai trentennale, è la grande esperienza maturata con partner di livello globale.
La scelta di essere una agenzia plurimandataria ci permette di offrire il meglio che si possa trovare sul mercato in termine di garanzie e affidabilità. Oggi siamo una realtà in continua crescita: attualmente offriamo prodotti di 2 Compagnie generaliste, Allianz Spa e HDI Assicurazioni Spa, e di altre Compagnie ognuna specializzata nel suo ambito specifico: un vantaggio, questo, che ci consente di trasferire ai nostri clienti, un’ampia visione per ogni bisogno, un know-how completo e multidisciplinare che si traduce in servizi eccellenti, ad alti livelli di qualità, professionalità e competenza.
Il nostro obiettivo è quello di creare solidi rapporti tra le compagnie che rappresentiamo e i clienti. Relazioni che durino nel tempo, basate sulla fiducia e sull’etica del rispetto.
Il nostro obiettivo è quello di fornire soluzioni e servizi professionali nella gestione del rischio e delle assicurazioni che proteggano al meglio i nostri clienti, in modo da avere clienti soddisfatti e ben assistiti, con i quali si possa instaurare una collaborazione duratura, basata su fiducia, onestà, professionalità e rispetto.
Siamo consapevoli che la buona fama della nostra agenzia dipende esclusivamente dalla soddisfazione dei nostri clienti e dalla qualità delle nostre prestazioni.
Più di 30 anni d’esperienza e specializzazione ci hanno fatto diventare quello che oggi siamo: un partner competente e affidabile per la copertura dei vostri fattori di rischio.

Name: Ag Generali Montebelluna
Description:
L’Agenzia Generale di Montebelluna di Generali Italia nasce nel 1956, negli anni del miracolo economico. È in quel periodo che nel montebellunese, da una tradizione artigianale nata con il Primo Conflitto Mondiale, inizia lo sviluppo del settore manifatturiero e calzaturiero.

L’Agenzia è fin da subito al fianco di tutti quei piccoli e ambiziosi artigiani che, investendo risparmi ed energie, diventano imprenditori dando vita al distretto della calzatura sportiva. Una storia industriale che parla di eccellenza e innovazione e di cui ancora oggi, 60 anni più tardi, ne è riconosciuto il valore a livello mondiale.

Ricerca dell’eccellenza e innovazione continua sono valori fondanti e distintivi dello sviluppo dell’Agenzia di Montebelluna che nel 2009 si fonde con l’Agenzia di Quinto di Treviso.

Nel 2017 per far fronte ad una realtà più complessa e meglio servire le esigenze dei clienti l’Agenzia apre una succursale a Bucarest.
Dal 2001 Stefano Paladin, Francesco Merlo e Maurizio Serena gestiscono l’Agenzia e gli uffici periferici con il supporto di oltre 40 collaboratori. Un gruppo di lavoro competente e qualificato che, animato dallo spirito che ha reso grande il nostro territorio, è preparato ad accompagnare gli imprenditori e le famiglie nelle sfide quotidiane oggi come allora. Dal 2019, inoltre, l’Agente Marco Pagano entra a far parte della compagine sociale, contribuendo ulteriormente alla forza e alla competenza della nostra squadra.

Informativa Privacy: www.generali.it/privacy/informativa-privacy

Name: AYKUT TEKİN SİGORTA ARACILIK HİZMETLERİ
Description:
Bilgi çağının henüz başlamadığı yıllarda daktilo ile poliçe yaptığımız süreçlerden bugün Pazar ile rekabette önde olabilmek için ve teknolojik yatırımların önemini bildiğimizden sizlerle kurduğumuz güvene dayalı birlikteliğimizi bizlere ulaşacağınız bu ortam ile de paylaşalım istedik.

Güven yaratan yaklaşımımız, tecrübelerimizden aldığımız güç ve sürekli yenilediğimiz bakış açımızla gelecek yıllarda dürüst, güvenilir bir çizgide, 30 yıldır durmaksızın siz müşterilerimize katkıda bulunmaya çalışıyoruz. 30 yılı geride bırakmanın gururunu da sizlerle birlikte yaşıyoruz. Tabii ki, kendilerine yardımcı olup, değer katacağımıza inanan ve işlerini bu güvenle bize teslim eden onlarca müşterimize , iş ortaklarımıza ayrı ayrı olmak üzere, bizim bugünlere ulaşmamıza sağladıkları destek için teşekkürlerimizi sunuyoruz.

Güven, adalet, sevgi ve saygı temelli anlayış doğrultusunda, iyi niyetli birlikten doğacak bir güçle, başaramayacağımız hiçbir şey olmadığına inanıyoruz. Daha güçlü ve daha mutlu yarınlar, kısaca daha güzel bir dünya için, birlikte hiç durmadan çalışmaya ve üretmeye, sizlere yardımcı olmaya devam edeceğiz. Güven yaratan yaklaşımımız.

Fark yaratan güven ayrıcalığı ile buluşmak dileğiyle...

Sigortambir ile trafik, kasko, konut, sağlık ve diğer tüm sigorta ürünlerinden oluşan geniş ürün yelpazesiyle ihtiyaçlarınızı karşılayın, kendinizi ve sevdiklerinizi güvence altına alın.

Name: Zaman Re(Insurance) Broker
Description:
Zaman is an insurance and reinsurance broking house headquartered in Baku, Azerbaijan with global offices in Tbilisi, Georgia and Istanbul, Turkiye.
 
Founded in 2003, Zaman is the leading (re)insurance broker in Azerbaijan and Georgia. Our extensive b2b portfolio consists of energy and non-energy SMEs in the Caspian and Turkish regions.
 
In 2017, Zaman became the first and only Lloyd’s broker in the CIS region, granting us direct access to the renowned marketplace. We operate an Energy facility at Lloyd’s with a $1 billion capacity in upstream, midstream and downstream for each and every risk. This gives a wider opportunity for clients to successfully place risks even when there is a deficit of capacity in the market. 
 
Despite the fact that our main clients include large energy firms, we also have strong competency in servicing SMEs, to whom we offer broker services across all types of insurance lines. 
 
Zaman’s practice is bolstered by its experienced and trained staff, who are all accredited members of the Chartered Insurance Institute (CII). Zaman also benefits from membership of prestigious organisations and broker associations including the LIIBA and UnisonSteadfast, among others. 
 
In the face of challenges experienced by all insurance market participants, Zaman is actively involved in seeking out new opportunities to adopt digitalisation, innovation and new technologies in the sphere to create effective solutions for clients. One example includes the fully digital Motor Insurance product, Kasko Butik, where price is formed from a combination of the driver’s behaviour and intensity of asset usage. Another example is the SaaS-based Risk Management platform, GeekBro, which changes risk management from a post to pre-event approach through real-time risk identification, evaluation and control software - enabling us to contribute to a safer and greener society. 
 
Our short-term plan is to expand operations to the UK, EU and Central Asia.

Name: Chabert Insurance The Ehrhardt Agency
Description:
At Chabert Insurance The Ehrhardt Agency, we give you the best customer service because we know how important you are. Get a free auto or homeowners quote with us today and see how much you can save. 

Saving money is a vital concern for nearly everyone in these difficult times. Because of this, it is important that you find the best possible rate for your auto and homeowners insurance policy. Luckily, it is much easier to find a great rate for insurance now than ever before.

In the past, you were pretty much stuck accepting whatever type of insurance your agent could find for you. Then, around ten years ago, nearly every insurance company started offering their product online. Soon after, people started feeling as though they were insurance experts and handled their polices online themselves. This wasn't a bad thing—in many cases. However, there are downfalls to working directly with the insurance companies.

In many cases, insurance customers do not understand what type of coverage they need. They take the lowest possible rate, without looking into the repercussions that could be caused. This is fine and good—until the time comes that they need to get something back from the insurance company.

Because of this, working with an independent agency is actually still a superior way to obtain insurance. The agent can help you get the coverage you need at a price you can afford. Additionally, there are many agencies now that offer features that make it even easier. For instance, in some cases you can compare insurance quotes online.

Unlike trying to compare by visiting each site yourself, using one of these tools means that you are comparing apples to apples. Therefore, not only are you paying as little as possible, you are still getting the type of coverage you need. Spend some time researching the options, and then choose an independent agency that will make things easy for you and save you money too.

Name: Beyaz Sigorta
Description:
Beyaz Sigorta Aracılık Hizmetleri Limited Şirketi 1995 yılında İstanbul’un Kadıköy ilçesinde faaliyetine başlamıştır.

Sağlık, hayat ve bireysel emeklilik sigortaları hizmetleri ile başlayan faaliyetlerine,  kaza, yangın, nakliyat, mühendislik ve sorumluluk sigortaları alanlarını da ekleyerek hizmet vermeye devam etmektedir.

2000 ile 2016 yılları arasında ülke genelinde 10 adet resmi şube yapısına ulaşmış, temsil ettiği köklü sigorta şirketlerinin sadece prim üretiminde değil, müşteri memnuniyeti ve kârlılık alanlarında da ulusal ve bölgesel birinciliklerine sahip olarak, sektördeki yerini birçok ödülle taçlandırmıştır.

2017 yılında almış olduğu yönetim kurulu kararı ile şirket yapılanması ve organizasyonunda değişiklik yaparak Merkez ofisini Antalya iline taşımıştır.

Kuruluşundan bu yana bireysel sigortacılık hizmetiyle tanınmış, bireysel sigortacılığın gerektirdiği özenli ve detaylı hizmet anlayışı sayesinde kurumlara da ulaşmıştır. “Güvenilir acente” olma sorumluluğu ve bilincinde olarak, Antalya merkez ve Alanya Şube yapılanması ile, sektörde 26. yılını doldurmuş, yoluna devam etmektedir.

Beyaz Sigorta‘nın amacı; müşterisinin ihtiyaçlarını doğru belirlemek, risk analizini doğru yapmaktır. Sahip olduğunuz yaşam kalitenizin korunması için ürünler geliştirmek ve belirlemek,  hasar zamanında hızlı ve güvenilir olmak, hizmet anlayışının temelini oluşturur.

Ürün ve hizmet kalitesinin belirleyici öğeleri; uzmanlık, deneyim, dürüstlük, şeffaflık, köklü geçmiş ve mevzuat bilgisidir. Beyaz Sigorta uzman ve deneyimli kadrosu ile sürekli gelişme ve iyileştirme anlayışıyla, kaliteli ürün ve hizmet sunmayı, bu hizmetin sürekliliğini sağlamayı ve ilgili tarafların ihtiyaç, beklenti ve şartlarını karşılamayı esas alır.

Beyaz Sigorta, sevdiklerinizle beraber sağlıklı, güvenli ve mutlu bir yaşam sürdürebilmeniz için; “Riskleri bize, zamanı sevdiklerinize ayırın” sloganıyla çıktığı yola sizlerle beraber devam etmektedir.

Name: Gillam Insurance Brokers
Description:
Glen Gillam - Managing Director

"I believe insurance is more than just a policy, it’s about feeling secure, knowing that someone truly understands your business and has your back. 

I take the time to listen and learn about your business because your story matters. I’m not here to sell you a one-size-fits-all policy, I tailor insurance that fits your needs, your risks, and your future. I know that cost is important, but so is knowing exactly what you are and aren’t covered for. No surprises, no jargon, just clear, honest advice from someone who genuinely cares.

I believe in trust, professionalism, and technical excellence, but more than that, I believe in authentic relationships. I’m here for the long haul, not just at renewal time. If the worst happens? you won’t be left to navigate it alone, I’ll be right there, helping with claims every step of the way.

I’m available when you need me. I put people before policies and focusing on making insurance work for you.

An Associate of the Chartered Insurance Institute, Chartered Insurance Broker and member of the Society of Insurance Broking with 30+ years of experience in the insurance industry."

Name: Monassurancedepret.fr
Description:

Toutes nos offres sont totalement digitales et bénéficient de la signature électronique.

Description:

Com uma visão integrada de seguros corporativos, gestão de riscos e soluções financeiras, ajudamos empresas a mitigar impactos operacionais, financeiros e reputacionais, fortalecendo sua resiliência e continuidade diante de cenários complexos e voláteis.

Nosso diferencial está na análise técnica e multidisciplinar: avaliamos riscos, mapeamos vulnerabilidades e estruturamos planos de proteção sob medida, alinhados à governança, compliance e planejamento estratégico de cada organização.

Name: ADUXIA
Description:

Name: TPC Benefits
Description:
TPC Benefits is an employee & executive benefits consulting firm. We help hundreds of companies throughout the state of Alabama. As a company, we take a consultative approach to ensure our clients are protected no matter what the situation. We design employee benefit packages that include medical insurance, life, disability, dental, vision, and voluntary benefits. We are also specialist in key executive life and disability policies. 

Our services help to protect employees in times of need, as well as assist companies in hiring and retaining top-tier talent.

Mike Priestley founded TPC Benefits in 1980 and has helped to pave the landscape for employee benefits in the state of Alabama. Mike played tennis at Samford University in Birmingham, while majoring in Insurance. Shortly thereafter, he founded the company and rapidly grew his practice to work with companies of all sizes and industries.

Josh Priestley has been with the company since 2007 as a Producer and Vice President. He has played an integral role in helping the company grow and is one Alabama's premier medical experts.

Our role is simple: support employees, protect employers, and make Medicare easier to navigate.

Name: Wyke Business Protection
Description:
Wyke Business Protection was founded with one clear purpose: to help businesses stay safe, resilient, and ready for anything. Building on the ethos of Wyke Financial, we have taken that same dedication to transparency, communication, and client-first thinking into the world of commercial insurance.

Our Managing Director brings a wealth of experience from years spent supporting clients across the financial and insurance sectors. Alongside our highly experienced team, we’ve seen first-hand how a single unexpected event, whether a fire, a lawsuit, a cyberattack, or a key person illness can threaten the survival of a business. And just as importantly, we’ve seen how having the right protection in place can turn a potential disaster into a manageable setback.

From day one, we knew we didn’t want to be “just another brokerage.” Our mission is to become a trusted partner for our clients, offering tailored solutions that reflect the reality of running a business today. No two businesses are the same, and neither are their risks, which is why we take the time to understand your operations, your goals, and your concerns before crafting insurance solutions that truly fit.

What makes us different is our commitment to clear communication and personal service. Insurance can feel complicated and impersonal; we aim to change that by making the process straightforward, transparent, and stress-free. We’ll keep you informed every step of the way, explaining not just what your options are, but why they matter to your business.

At Wyke Business Protection, we don’t just sell policies. We safeguard your livelihood, giving you the confidence to grow and innovate knowing that your business has a solid safety net. Whether you’re a sole trader or a growing enterprise, we’re here to protect what you’ve worked so hard to build.

Wyke Business Protection is a trading style of Wyke Financial Ltd.
