Name: Assurévia
Description:
Du terrain à la confiance, la naissance d’AssureVia
AssureVia, c’est avant tout l’histoire de deux professionnels, Benjamin Berrous et David Moaté, qui ont passé des années aux côtés des intermittents du spectacle, techniciens, artistes, et indépendants du monde de l’art vivant et de l’audiovisuel.

En travaillant au plus près de ces femmes et ces hommes passionnés mais souvent peu accompagnés, nous avons pris conscience d’une réalité, trop de professionnels vivent sans véritable protection, sans accompagnement clair pour anticiper les aléas de la vie, faire face à une maladie, ou préparer sereinement leur retraite.

Ce constat, doublé de notre volonté d'agir avec éthique dans un secteur parfois dominé par des cabinets aux pratiques peu transparentes, nous a poussés à créer en 2023 le cabinet AssureVia.

Un projet profondément humain
AssureVia est né de cette proximité avec le terrain, de notre engagement à remettre l’écoute, le conseil et la transparence au cœur de la relation client.
Nous avons voulu un cabinet indépendant, bienveillant et à taille humaine, capable d’offrir un accompagnement sur-mesure, durable et en toute confiance.

Nous collaborons avec les meilleurs partenaires du marché, sans lien exclusif, pour garantir des solutions fiables, personnalisées et optimisées. Que ce soit pour votre mutuelle, votre prévoyance, votre retraite, votre assurance de prêt, votre multirisque professionnelle ou votre épargne, nous cherchons la meilleure option pour vous, pas pour nous.

Un cabinet ouvert à tous
Si AssureVia a été pensé à l’origine pour les métiers du spectacle et de la création, notre approche s’adresse aujourd’hui à tous les professionnels et à toutes les personnes en quête d’un accompagnement honnête, bienveillant et humain. Que vous soyez salarié, indépendant, chef d’entreprise, artisan ou futur retraité, nous sommes là pour vous aider à bâtir un avenir serein.

Nous ne vendons pas des produits.
Nous construisons des parcours de vie.

Description:

Naša uža specijalnost je osiguranje potraživanja (Trade Credit Insurance), imajući u vidu da je direktor društva jedan od pionira i prvih specijalista domaćeg tržišta osiguranja u ovoj oblasti.
Svakako, našim klijentima smo na raspolaganju i kod ugovaranja svih drugih vrsta osiguranja koja štite vaše zaposlene, poslovanje, imovinu i sve vaše interese za koje smatrate da je potrebno obezbediti ih kvalitetnim osiguravajućim pokrićem.

Kroz saradnju sa vodećim osiguravajućim društvima, a imajući u vidu naše dugogodišnje iskustvo na lokalnom pa i evropskom tržištu, garantujemo personalizovan pristup, brzu uslugu i potpunu transparentnost u svakom koraku, bez ikakvih finansijskih ili ugovornih obaveza, jer želimo da naše klijente zadržimo prvoklasnom uslugom, a ne slovom ugovora.

Description:
Founded in 1962 by Richard F. Hull in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, Hull & Company, Inc. was built on a foundation of integrity, professionalism, and strong carrier relationships. From the beginning, our focus has been on delivering impeccable service and attention to detail—principles that continue to define our business today.

In 2005, Hull & Company joined Brown & Brown, Inc., enhancing our market leverage and expanding our product offerings. This strategic partnership reaffirmed our commitment to becoming the premier wholesale insurance operation, known for service excellence and deep expertise.

By 2013, we proudly celebrated 50 years of serving licensed insurance agents and brokers across the U.S. and the U.K. Today, Hull & Company ranks among the largest wholesale brokerage operations in the excess and surplus lines marketplace.

Our Wholesale Brokerage Division specializes in marketing excess and surplus commercial and personal insurance products to retail agencies, as well as reinsurance solutions to insurance companies nationwide. We represent a wide range of U.S. and U.K. surplus lines carriers, and several of our offices serve as Lloyd’s of London correspondents. In select states, we also offer access to admitted markets for smaller agencies that may not otherwise have entry.

Our product portfolio includes:
Commercial Lines
Marine
Professional Lines
Personal Lines
We thrive on placing difficult-to-insure risks—it's our specialty and the hallmark of our continued success.

Dabei schätzen unsere Kunden besonders unsere fachliche Expertise, langjährige Erfahrung sowie die persönliche und verlässliche Beratung. Die weit überdurchschnittliche Beständigkeit der verschiedenen Kundenbeziehungen bestätigt unseren Anspruch.

Trotz stetigem Wandel setzen wir auf Kontinuität und künftig auf das Beste aus zwei Generationen. Denn auch in Zukunft soll Kontinuität unser Markenzeichen sein. Um das zu gewährleisten, haben wir die entsprechenden Weichen gestellt. Mit dem Zusammenschluss der Allianzvertretungen Joos & Marquart und Björn Breuer stellen wir uns erfolgreich der Zukunft.

Name: Assurance SwissLife Bordeaux - Rémi Niel
Description:
Swiss Life en France : 

Swiss Life est un acteur référent en assurance et gestion de patrimoine, avec un positionnement reconnu d’assureur gestion privée. 
Notre approche est globale en assurance vie, banque privée, gestion financière, ainsi qu’en santé, prévoyance et dommages.

Une approche globale, parce que l’essence de notre métier est d’accompagner chaque parcours de vie, privé et professionnel. 
Grâce à un conseil personnalisé, fondé sur la proximité, l’écoute et la pédagogie, nous construisons chaque jour une relation de confiance avec chacun de nos clients, particuliers comme entreprises.

En tant qu’entreprise responsable, nous sommes engagés dans une démarche de développement durable, dont l’ambition est de permettre aux générations actuelles et futures de vivre selon leurs propres choix.

Chiffres clés au 31.12.2022 :

6,9 milliards d’euros de chiffre d’affaires 
1 500 000 clients et adhérents

Rémi Niel - Agent SwissLife Patrimoine et Retraite en Gironde :

Mon histoire commence à Bordeaux, où j’ai obtenu un Master en Finance de Marché à l’Université de Bordeaux.

Pendant 10 ans, j’ai évolué dans le secteur bancaire, aux côtés de chefs d’entreprise de tous horizons – de l’artisan local au dirigeant de grandes franchises nationales.

C’est dans cet environnement exigeant que j’ai appris à décoder les défis financiers, juridiques et patrimoniaux qui jalonnent votre quotidien de dirigeant.

Mais, un constat s’est imposé : les dirigeants manquent souvent de solutions réellement adaptées à leurs ambitions et à la complexité de leurs besoins.

Animé par la conviction qu’un accompagnement sur-mesure est indispensable, j’ai décidé de quitter le confort d’une carrière en banque pour bâtir une offre qui place vos priorités au cœur de mes engagements.

Chaque témoignage de satisfaction que je reçois aujourd’hui témoigne de la justesse de ce choix, et c’est pour cela que je continue, jour après jour, à m’investir pleinement dans votre réussite.

Name: Life Partner Sarl
Description:
Life Partner – Votre partenaire de confiance pour des assurances adaptées et optimisées
Le monde de l’assurance peut sembler complexe et fastidieux, surtout lorsqu’il évolue constamment. Pourtant, bien s’assurer, c’est protéger ce qui compte vraiment : vous, votre famille et votre avenir.

Chez Life Partner, nous mettons notre expertise à votre service pour vous aider à faire les meilleurs choix en toute sérénité. Nous ne vendons pas des assurances, nous trouvons des solutions sur mesure adaptées à vos besoins.

 Votre vie évolue, vos assurances suivent-elles ?

Un changement professionnel ou familial ?
Un déménagement en Suisse ou un départ à l’étranger ?
Une nouvelle situation financière ou patrimoniale ?
 Beaucoup de personnes souscrivent des assurances une fois et n’y pensent plus… jusqu’au jour où elles réalisent que leur couverture n’est plus adaptée. Nous sommes là pour éviter toute carence, optimiser vos contrats et maîtriser votre budget.

 Pourquoi choisir Life Partner ?
 Conseil indépendant et impartial – Nous comparons les meilleures offres du marché sans être liés à une seule compagnie.
 Accompagnement personnalisé – Chaque client est unique, chaque solution aussi. Nous analysons votre situation pour vous proposer une couverture 100 % adaptée.
 Gain de temps et tranquillité d’esprit – Nous nous occupons de toutes les démarches pour que vous puissiez vous concentrer sur ce qui compte vraiment.
 Optimisation de vos coûts – Pourquoi payer plus cher pour moins bien couvert ? Nous trouvons les meilleures options pour protéger votre avenir sans exploser votre budget.
 Suivi et service client dédié – Nous restons à vos côtés sur le long terme, prêts à ajuster votre protection à chaque étape de votre vie.

 Un doute sur vos assurances ?
Prenez 30 minutes avec nous pour faire le point gratuitement et sans engagement. 

Plus qu’un courtier, un véritable partenaire pour votre avenir.

Description:
Born from firsthand experience operating senior living communities, Echo Assurance isn't your typical insurance brokerage. We're owner-operators who saw a gap in the industry - where traditional brokers were selling policies, while operators needed partners who understood the delicate balance between resident care, operational efficiency, and risk management.

Our track record speaks volumes: Over $2 billion in placed premiums protecting 250,000+ beds across 500+ communities. But what truly matters is how we've transformed insurance from a necessary expense into a strategic advantage for senior living operators.

When a memory care facility faced a 300% premium increase that threatened their existence, we didn't just find coverage - we engineered a solution that cut their insurance spend by 40%. When communities struggled with rising worker's compensation costs, our innovative risk management strategies reduced claims by 45%. These aren't just statistics - they're the difference between communities thriving or merely surviving.

Led by owners who actively operate IL, AL, and MC communities across the Western U.S., Echo Assurance brings a unique perspective to every client relationship. We test our solutions in our own communities first, because we believe in protecting your residents the same way we protect ours.

Our expertise in captive insurance programs, alternative risk financing, and operational risk management has earned industry recognition - including Healthcare Power Broker honors. But our real measure of success is helping operators sleep better at night, knowing their communities are protected by partners who understand senior living from the inside out.

Echo Assurance exists for one reason: to empower senior living operators to focus on what matters most - providing exceptional care - while we handle the complexities of risk management with the insight only fellow operators can provide.

Enquanto muitos corretores se limitam a vender o plano e desaparecer, nós assumimos a gestão completa do benefício saúde da sua empresa.

Sabemos que os reajustes abusivos dos planos de saúde têm corroído orçamentos e pressionado RHs.

A burocracia na inclusão, exclusão e atendimento aos funcionários consome um tempo precioso do RH que deveria ser usado em atividades estratégicas.

Nós atacamos esse problema de frente.
 Reduzimos sinistralidade com campanhas de uso consciente e acompanhamento próximo.
 Automatizamos processos de movimentações, tirando o operacional do RH.
 Atendemos diretamente o funcionário, eliminando ruído e liberando o RH para o que importa.

O resultado? Empresas com custos controlados, menos dor de cabeça e funcionários mais satisfeitos.

Se o seu corretor atual só aparece na hora da renovação, está na hora de repensar quem cuida da saúde da sua empresa.

Name: GMAC Capital Insurance
Description:
When storms hit your business, who do you call?
GMAC Capital Insurance, is not just another insurance company—we’re your anchor in the storm. When the unexpected happens—an injury on-site, a payroll mess, a workers’ comp claim you didn’t see coming—because it's not IF something goes wrong, it's WHEN. Built for business, ready for the storm. GMAC just works...

With over 25 years of experience supporting hard-to-place businesses in construction, logistics, & other high-risk industries, we make the complex operations feel simple again.

WHAT WE SPECIALIZE IN:
Workers’ Comp: Your crew keeps you moving—keep them covered. We ensure that if someone gets hurt on the job, you don't drown in medical bills or lost wages. Strategic support to keep costs low & teams covered.
 Property & Casualty (P&C): Business property is more than bricks & beams—it’s your livelihood. Our Property & Casualty policies guard your office, inventory, & equipment against the unexpected. 
 General Liability: Building your business? Don’t let a slip-and-fall (or coffee-and-keyboard) derail you. GMAC protects you when accidents happen—so you can focus on growth, not lawsuits.
 Commercial Auto Insurance: Your fleet keeps you rolling—make sure an accident doesn’t grind you to a halt. GMAC Commercial Auto insurance covers your vehicles, drivers, and goods-in-transit, so you can haul with confidence.

WHY GMAC?
Because your clients don’t need another sales pitch—they need a partner who shows up when it counts, not when it's convenient.
We specialize in solutions for businesses that most agencies won't cover. High-risk? Underserved? That’s our wheelhouse.

Whether you’re a broker, agency, or business owner, we give you the tools, coverage, and clarity you need to operate with confidence—even when the tides turn.

 Let GMAC Capital Insurance be your beacon, the lighthouse that guides you through whatever storm life throws your way.

Name: EPIC Insurance
Description:
EPIC Insurance
Ασφάλεια με Ανθρώπινο Πρόσωπο

Το DNA μας
Από το 2005 μέχρι σήμερα, στεκόμαστε δίπλα σας με αφοσίωση και επαγγελματισμό. Η ιστορία μας ξεκίνησε με ένα όραμα: να επαναπροσδιορίσουμε την έννοια της ασφάλισης, κάνοντάς την προσωπική υπόθεση για κάθε άνθρωπο ξεχωριστά.

Η Φιλοσοφία μας
Πιστεύουμε ότι η πραγματική ασφάλεια ξεκινά από την κατανόηση. Κατανόηση των αναγκών σας, των ανησυχιών σας, των στόχων σας. Με βαθιά γνώση του παρελθόντος και το βλέμμα σταθερά στο μέλλον, χτίζουμε μαζί σας σχέσεις εμπιστοσύνης που αντέχουν στο χρόνο.

Η Διαφορά μας
Προσωπική Προσέγγιση
Κάθε άνθρωπος είναι μοναδικός. Κάθε ασφαλιστικό πλάνο σχεδιάζεται από την αρχή, με βάση τις δικές σας ανάγκες.

Συνεχής Υποστήριξη
Είμαστε δίπλα σας σε κάθε βήμα, από την πρώτη συνάντηση μέχρι τη στιγμή που μας χρειαστείτε. Η δέσμευσή μας δεν σταματά στην υπογραφή του συμβολαίου.

Διαφάνεια & Αμεσότητα
Μιλάμε τη γλώσσα της ειλικρίνειας. Χωρίς περίπλοκους όρους, χωρίς ψιλά γράμματα.

Το Όραμά μας
Οραματιζόμαστε ένα μέλλον όπου η ασφάλεια δεν είναι πολυτέλεια αλλά δικαίωμα. Όπου κάθε άνθρωπος μπορεί να χτίσει το αύριο που ονειρεύεται, γνωρίζοντας ότι έχει δίπλα του έναν αξιόπιστο σύμμαχο.

Οι Υπηρεσίες μας
Προσφέρουμε ολοκληρωμένη κάλυψη σε κάθε πτυχή της ζωής σας:

Προστασία Ζωής & Υγείας
Γιατί δεν υπάρχει πολυτιμότερο αγαθό από την υγεία σας

Ασφάλεια Περιουσίας
Προστατεύουμε αυτά που με κόπο αποκτήσατε

Επαγγελματική Κάλυψη
Στηρίζουμε το επιχειρηματικό σας όραμα

Συνταξιοδοτικός Σχεδιασμός
Σχεδιάζουμε μαζί το μέλλον που σας αξίζει
 Η Δέσμευσή μας

* Ακούμε προσεκτικά τις ανάγκες σας
* Σχεδιάζουμε εξατομικευμένες λύσεις
* Παραμένουμε δίπλα σας σε κάθε βήμα
* Ανταποκρινόμαστε άμεσα όταν μας χρειάζεστε
* Εξελισσόμαστε συνεχώς για να σας προσφέρουμε το καλύτερο
Το Μέλλον
Στην EPIC Insurance, δεν μένουμε στατικοί. Εξελισσόμαστε διαρκώς, αφουγκραζόμαστε τις αλλαγές, προσαρμοζόμαστε στις νέες προκλήσεις. Πάντα με γνώμονα τον άνθρωπο, πάντα με σεβασμό στις αξίες που μας έφεραν ως εδώ.

Name: Hull & Company - JaxLanta
Description:
Richard F. Hull founded Hull & Company, Inc. in Ft. Lauderdale, FL in December 1962. He had a vision to create a strong national network of MGA offices built on integrity, professionalism and relationships with the best carriers in the specialty industry. Impeccable service & attention to detail were the trademarks of the business and continue to this day. We were acquired by Brown & Brown, Inc. in 2005 adding leverage to our overall carrier relationship & product line as well as affirming our commitment to become the premier wholesale operation based on service and expertise.

 In 2013 we celebrated 50 years in business serving licensed insurance agents and brokers through our offices across the United States as well as the U.K. Today our combined operations rank us as one of the largest wholesale brokerage operations in the excess and surplus lines marketplace.

Our Wholesale Brokerage Division markets excess and surplus commercial and personal insurance products to retail insurance agencies, and reinsurance products and services to insurance companies throughout the United States. Wholesale Brokerage Division offices represent various U.S. and U.K. surplus lines insurance companies, and certain of our offices are also Lloyd’s of London correspondents. The Wholesale Brokerage Division also represents admitted insurance companies in some states for the purpose of enabling smaller agencies that otherwise would not have access to these markets to place business.

Excess and surplus lines insurance products include a wide variety of insurance coverage to meet the varied needs of today’s retailers – including Commercial Lines, Marine, Professional Lines and Personal Lines. Difficult-to-insure is our specialty & trademark for continued success.

Name: GF Horsens, Silkeborg og Skanderborg (GF Forsikring)
Description:
GF Horsens, Silkeborg og Skanderborg har kontorer i Horsens, Silkeborg og Skanderborg og forsikrer både privatpersoner og virksomheder i området fra Hammel til Rask Mølle. GF står for ”Gruppe Forsikring”, fordi vi er tæt på medlemmerne, som vi deler årets overskud med.  #overskudtilhinanden 
 
Vi er en af de selvstændige GF-forsikringsklubber, der sammen med GF Fonden ejer GF Forsikring. som er et af Danmarks største medlemsejede forsikringsselskaber. Og med et vidt forgrenet net af lokale medlemskontorer er GF i dag “landsdækkende lokale”.  
 
Hos GF Horsens, Silkeborg og Skanderborg er vi meget bevidste om, at vores medlemmer i sidste ende er vores ejere. Det forpligter os til at yde personlig rådgivning og service – og til at være en attraktiv arbejdsplads, fordi vi ved, at gode medlemsoplevelser skabes af dygtige og engagerede medarbejdere.  
På denne side kan du følge de vigtigste nyheder om nye tiltag, viden om forsikring, gode råd og ledige stillinger hos os i GF Horsens, Silkeborg og Skanderborg. 
Vi ønsker at fremme vidensdeling og en konstruktiv dialog om de emner, vi berører her på LinkedIn. Vi forbeholder os ret til at slette kommentarer, der ikke har noget med det pågældende opslag at gøre, eller som indeholder gentagen negativ retorik. 
Vi glæder os til at møde dig og din virksomhed her på LinkedIn. 

Telefon: 7224 4160
Branche: Forsikring 
Størrelse: 18 medarbejdere 
Websted: https://gfforsikring.dk/Horsens
privat- og erhvervsforsikringer.

Description:
Siamo un’agenzia di assicurazione italiana, nata dalla voglia e dall’entusiasmo di mettere a fattor comune esperienze e storie professionali per dare vita ad un player innovativo in grado di rispondere nel modo più efficace e customer-centric alle nuove esigenze del mercato assicurativo.

Come hub tecnico-commerciale, siamo in grado di progettare e assemblare le garanzie assicurative più adatte per i bisogni rilevati, che diventano operative grazie alle partnership con primarie compagnie assicurative. In questo modo, forniamo ad agenzie e broker un nuovo paradigma di relazione con i propri clienti. 

Abbiamo una forte vocazione al supporto di specifiche nicchie di mercato fra cui: imprenditori agricoli e artigiani, liberi professionisti, il mondo cooperativo, il terzo settore. Ci guidano tre parole chiave:

𝐏𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐳𝐳𝐚𝐳𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐞 | Progettiamo e costruiamo, insieme ai nostri Partner assicurativi e tecnici, le garanzie assicurative e le combinazioni finanziarie adatte al singolo cliente, in funzione delle sue reali necessità. Per questo ci definiamo “Officina assicurativa”.

𝐒𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐭𝐚̀ | Riteniamo la chiarezza nella comunicazione e nella redazione dei contratti assicurativi fondamentale. Per questo, la nostra contrattualistica utilizza un linguaggio diretto e comprensibile, supportato da infografiche e dall’utilizzo di colori.

𝐓𝐞𝐜𝐧𝐨𝐥𝐨𝐠𝐢𝐚 | Crediamo nel potere rivoluzionario dell’innovazione tecnologica: i nostri servizi nascono digital oriented, utilizzando le più moderne tecnologie blockchain nella predisposizione delle polizze e nella loro gestione nel tempo.

Name: Hickory Hill Insurance Agency, LLC Authors of Medicare Blueprint
Description:
In 2013 Tim Hanbury and Jason Mackey decided to focus on Medicare. Having been in the insurance industry for over a decade they saw how confusing and challenging it was for their clients to navigate the Medicare system. They decided to write a book in plain language that was simple to understand and to make it available to anyone that wants it. After several years of painstakingly researching all of the scenarios, the book was published: Medicare Blueprint - a just the facts approach to designing your Medicare benefits. In 2023, still seeing a need to focus on improving how they can assist their clients, Tim and Jason partnered with Scott Klonowski, founder of the INSXCloud Broker Platform. Together they analyzed the Medicare market and put together a plan to build the best Medicare-focused insurance agency in South Carolina. And with that Hickory Hill Insurance Agency was born. We believe in old-fashioned values and strive to treat our clients with that sense of community that has been lost in this modern world. We are committed to educating, providing you with the resources and assistance needed to choose the Medicare plan that will best fit your needs. We are proud to have the opportunity to better serve Medicare beneficiaries in South Carolina for many years to come! Please join our online community and message or call us and we will send you a free copy of the book Medicare Blueprint.

Our Leadership 
Scott Klonowski, President
Scott has been in the business since 1993 and is the founder of My1HR and INSXCloud.

Jason Mackey, Vice President of Operations
Jason, an Air Force Veteran, joined his family's insurance agency in 1998. The agency had been in business since 1989 which allowed him the knowledge needed to provide the best Medicare solutions to his clients.

Tim Hanbury, Vice President of Sales
Tim is a Registered Health Underwriter and has over 30 years of experience in the health insurance business. He has helped thousands navigate Medicare.

For investment advisors, Valero provides insurance-based solutions that complement wealth management strategies, such as tax-efficient wealth transfer, income protection, and annuity options that safeguard assets and enhance retirement income planning.

For tax professionals, Valero offers strategies that mitigate estate tax liabilities, optimize business deductions, and structure policies for wealth transfer, helping maximize client outcomes.

For legal professionals, Valero enhances estate and business succession planning by structuring insurance solutions that protect wealth, ensure business continuity, and provide liquidity for estate settlements.

For health insurance professionals, Valero offers disability, long-term care, and supplemental life insurance solutions, providing added financial protection against health-related disruptions.

For property and casualty insurance professionals, Valero supports risk mitigation efforts by incorporating life and disability insurance into business continuity and personal asset protection strategies.

Through these partnerships, Valero Insurance Agency helps professionals deliver holistic, value-added solutions that address clients’ immediate and long-term needs, enhancing their overall service offerings and ensuring comprehensive financial security.

Name: Chris Mellor Insurance Brokers Limited
Description:
You deserve to be treated like a human, not just another policy number.
CMIB takes the time to get to know you and your familial needs before recommending a policy. We want to make sure that you’re fully protected in case of a loss.

We are a family-owned insurance broker company specializing in making personalized insurance products you can trust. CMIB helps you live life to the fullest by building long-lasting relationships throughout your life’s journey.

We offer a wide range of insurance products to cover your vehicles, property and your business, so you can have peace of mind knowing that you’re protected.

In addition, our team of insurance experts is always available to answer any of your questions. We’ll make sure you understand your policy and what it covers. Most importantly, we always have your best interests at heart.

Founded in 1957 by our family patriarch, Chris F. Mellor, CMIB has been an insurance broker institution for over 60 years.

From collecting premiums face to face for The Prudential Assurance Company in his native England, he learned about the needs of his clients by listening to their stories and life experiences.

It is this life-long commitment to client service which informs everything we do at CMIB today.

His personalized service made its way to North America, making us a company that has always been focused on providing quality life insurance products to families for various needs.

In the ‘70s, Chris’s daughters, Carol and Jane, and son Chris J Mellor joined the firm. Later in the ‘90s, granddaughter, Katie, became active in the business.

Three generations of Mellors have proudly continued the family tradition of insurance brokering in Ontario. Today, CMIB continues to serve in Ontario, with a long-standing reputation for providing quality insurance products and excellent service.

GDPT is an independent strategic consulting and business solutions firm based in the Canary Islands. We combine technical expertise, forward-looking vision and a practical approach to support companies, institutions and executives in critical decisions that shape their competitiveness, security and long-term growth.

Our work is structured around three specialised areas:

1. Port & Strategic Advisory
We advise on port concessions, Free Zones, logistics–industrial developments and strategic planning. We translate complex regulatory frameworks into operational decisions that reduce risk, optimise processes and strengthen cooperation between businesses and public authorities.

2. Corporate Insurance Solutions
We design insurance programmes for companies and groups, aligning protection, cost efficiency and strategy. We bring clarity to a traditionally opaque sector, offering solutions in group health, life, international mobility, liability and industrial risk.

3. Collective Social Benefits (Previsión Social Colectiva)
We help organisations develop employee benefit and savings policies, integrating tax incentives, talent retention and long-term financial planning. In a changing labour environment, building solid protection systems has become a true competitive advantage.

At GDPT we work under a core principle: rigour in analysis, transparency in recommendations and continuous support. Our model integrates strategic consulting, regulatory expertise and advanced insurance solutions to deliver real, measurable value.

Companies need partners who provide judgement and vision.
At GDPT we offer exactly that: clear decisions, sustainable growth and strategy with purpose.

We provide a full portfolio of insurance services including property, general liability, product liability, professional liability, and more.  We help our clients engage in practice of risk management to prevent the severity and frequency of claims; as well as to protect health and safety of products, and the community at large. We also provide custom tailored employee health benefits to attract and retain talent; navigate the ever-changing landscape of healthcare; and bring cost efficient programs with high value to improve health outcomes.  We are pleased to announce we've found a way to incorporate medicinal benefits into healthcare through employer health benefits, as an alternative to opioids and other prescriptions drugs.  Evidence based studies indicate more productive workforce, less time out, and a cost savings to overall health spend.
In the cannabis industry there are many barriers to entry, with access to capital as the number one barrier.  We leverage our relationships with private investors to help raise capital for our clients to join in the success of the emerging cannabis industry.

We simplify your activity in the field of insurance and help you adapt the existing solutions according to the risks of your company, with national or multinational packages personalized.

Description:
Vanda Sigorta, 2009 yılında kurulup, Zincirlikuyu'da bulunan merkez ofis ile hizmet vermeye başlamıştır. Sektöre ilk olarak Anadolu Sigorta acenteliği ile giriş yaparak, ilerleyen yıllarda gelişen müşteri portföyü ve müşteri talepleri doğrultusunda, sektörün önde gelen sigorta şirketlerini bünyesine katarak emin adımlarla kurumsallaşma yolunda ilerlemektedir.

Eğitimli yönetici kadrosu liderliğinde; çalışan personel seçimi titizlikle yapılıp, müşteri taleplerini maksimum düzeyde karşılayabilen, fiyat odaklı değil hizmet odaklı iş anlayışı ile sektörde güçlü ve öncü konuma gelmiştir.

Farkımız;

Müşteriye en ucuz primi verip kötü gününde poliçesiyle baş başa bırakmak değil, en doğru teminatı en iyi primle verip uzun yıllar calışmaktır.

 

Tarzımız;

Genciz ! Dinamiğiz ! Eğitimliyiz ! Değişmeyen kadromuzla teknolojiyi en üst seviyede kullanır, müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına en hızlı şekilde karşılık veririz.

Biz, hizmetlerini müşterilerin değişen ihtiyaçlarına uygun olarak geliştirmeye ve yenilikçi, kaliteli hizmetler sunmaya kararlıyız.

Los latinos generalmente no tenemos la cultura de planificar nuestro futuro y de quienes amamos, y desconocemos que existen herramientas que nos pueden ayudar a estar protegidos ante eventos inesperados.

Y aunque somos personas muy trabajadoras, muchas veces no le damos la importancia necesaria al ahorro y a la planificación de nuestros ingresos para cuando no podamos trabajar ya sea por la edad, enfermedad o discapacidad. Si sumamos en un período de 20 años pueden haber pasado por nuestras manos más de 1 millón de dólares (si consideramos ingresos anuales de $50000) y tal vez no tenemos ahorrado nada de ese dinero.

En Millas de Vida queremos ayudarte a través de planes que te brinden beneficios en vida y permitan ahorrar para el futuro; planes que garanticen que tú y tu familia tienen tranquilidad financiera sabiendo que cuentan con una póliza que los respalda.

Description:

At MeyerInsure, we believe that good broking isn’t just about placing cover - it’s about making people feel seen, supported, and confident in their decisions.

Name: Seguro do Seu Carro
Description:
Seguro do Seu Carro é uma corretora digital que, desde 2020, vem transformando o acesso ao seguro automotivo no Brasil. Nossa missão é descomplicar o seguro auto, oferecendo uma experiência totalmente digital, acessível e personalizada para motoristas em todo o país.

Como Representante Oficial da Loovi Seguros, proporcionamos uma cobertura robusta de até R$ 150.000,00 para automóveis, tudo com a conveniência de um app exclusivo para gestão de coberturas. Nossos clientes contam com proteção contra colisão, seguro para terceiros e assistência 24 horas que inclui serviços como reboque, chaveiro e carro reserva.

Com mais de 10.000 veículos protegidos em nosso portfólio, seguimos empenhados em garantir a cada motorista uma experiência simplificada e segura, priorizando acessibilidade, inovação e excelência.

Name: Schmitt & Hartmann OHG
Description:
Seit 1984 steht der Versicherungsservice der Schmitt & Hartmann OHG für familiäre Werte und persönliche Beratung. Gegründet von Walfried Schmitt, hat sich unser Unternehmen als Familienbetrieb etabliert und wird heute in zweiter Generation von seinem Sohn Michael Schmitt geführt. Seit 2024 wird er von Simon Hartmann in der Geschäftsführung unterstützt.

Wir freuen uns, dass bereits fast 2.500 Kunden unsere Arbeit schätzen und sich unser Kundenkreis stetig erweitert. Wenn auch Sie Interesse an einer ganzheitlichen Beratung und passgenauen Absicherung haben, zögern Sie nicht, uns jederzeit zu kontaktieren. Oder lernen Sie uns bei einer unserer Veranstaltungen kennen.

Wir freuen uns auf ein gemeinsames Gespräch.

Es grüßen aus Alzenau
Michael Schmitt & Simon Hartmann

Name: Allianz Agentur Pascal Schaufler
Description:
Allianz Agentur Schaufler – aus Tradition in die Zukunft - mit Sicherheit.

Wir stehen für Sicherheit, Vertrauen und persönliche Begleitung – heute und in Zukunft. Unser Ziel ist es, die Tradition verlässlicher Beratung fortzuführen und gleichzeitig neue Wege zu gehen, um für unsere Kundinnen und Kunden stets die besten Lösungen zu finden.

Unsere Leistungen für Sie:

Für Privatkunden: 
Absicherung für das, was Ihnen am meisten bedeutet – Ihr Zuhause, Ihr Auto, Ihre Gesundheit und Ihre Zukunft.

Für Unternehmer & Selbstständige: 
Durchdachte Konzepte, die Ihr Unternehmen, Ihre Mitarbeitenden und Ihre Pläne zuverlässig schützen.

Für Ihre finanzielle Zukunft: 
Individuelle Vorsorge- und Finanzlösungen, die Sicherheit und Chancen vereinen.

Im Schadenfall: 
Persönliche Begleitung und schnelle Unterstützung – unkompliziert, fair und verlässlich.

Versicherung ist Vertrauenssache. Deshalb stehen bei uns Menschen im Mittelpunkt, nicht Produkte. Mit der Allianz als starkem Partner im Hintergrund und unserer persönlichen Betreuung vor Ort begleiten wir Sie sicher durch alle Lebensphasen.

Name: Ignite Insurance Broking Private Limited

At Ignite Insurance, we understand that employees are the strength of any organization, and we provide flawless, process-driven employee benefit solutions, such as group medical insurance policies, group personal accident policies, and group term policies.

Our service range includes industrial all risks policy, fire and allied perils policy, project insurances, machinery breakdown insurance, boilers and pressure plants insurance, loss of profits, marine insurance, personal accident insurance, medical insurance, and liabilities insurance.

Name: ONX Sigorta
Description:
ONX Sigorta olarak, sigorta sektöründe müşterilerimize yüksek kalitede hizmet sunmayı hedefleriz. Allianz iş ortaklığıyla, hayat, sağlık, araç, konut ve işyeri sigortaları konularında kapsamlı çözümler sunarız.
Müşteri memnuniyetini en üst düzeyde tutar, hayatınızı, sağlığınızı, aracınızı ve mülkünüzü korumayı amaçlarız. Sektöre hakimiyetimiz ve deneyimimiz sayesinde, sigorta ihtiyaçlarınızı anlamak, riskleri doğru bir şekilde değerlendirmek ve size en uygun sigorta planlarını sunmak için çalışırız.
ONX Sigorta olarak, dürüstlük, şeffaflık ve güvenilirlik ilkelerine bağlıyız. Sizin için en uygun sigorta çözümlerini sunarken, sektördeki en iyi standartlara uygun hareket etmeyi taahhüt ederiz.
Gücümüzü, Allianz iş ortaklığımızdan alırız. Bu iş birliği sayesinde, sizlere mükemmel bir sigorta deneyimi sunarız. ONX Sigorta olarak, müşterilerimize kişiselleştirilmiş çözümler sunarız. Uzmanlığımız sayesinde, ihtiyaçlarınızı analiz ederek, sizin için en uygun ve kapsamlı sigorta planlarını oluştururuz.
Gelişmiş teknolojiyi kullanarak hizmetlerimizi sürekli olarak geliştiririz. Çevrimiçi platformumuz aracılığıyla kolaylıkla sigorta teklifleri alabilir, poliçelerinizi yönetebilir ve herhangi bir sorun durumunda bize ulaşabilirsiniz. Ayrıca, sigorta konularında bilgilendirici içerikler sunarak sigorta bilincinizi artırmayı hedefleriz.
Bizi tercih ettiğiniz için teşekkür ederiz ONX SİGORTA olarak, sigorta ihtiyaçlarınızı en iyi şekilde karşılamak için buradayız. Tüm sigorta çözümleri için bizimle iletişime geçebilirsiniz.

Name: professionalindemnityinsurance.com.au
Description:
We understand that navigating professional indemnity insurance can be complex, stressful and time consuming. We also recognise that your business is unique with its own set of needs and requirements.  

As your insurance broker, we will focus on relationship first – understanding who you are and what your company does.  

This will allow us to accurately present your business and its risk to insurers, and secure competitive quotes on this basis. From here, we will make recommendations as to which insurance policy best suits your needs, ensuring that you are appropriately covered in the event of a claim. 

Why work with us? 

Policy Expertise - We have specialised knowledge and experience in the insurance industry. We have a deep understanding of the different types of coverage available and can ensure that the coverage in place aligns with your specific needs. 

Competitive Pricing - We have access to a wide range of insurance providers and policies. We utilise this to create contestability amongst insurers, negotiating the best possible pricing and coverage.

Market Access - We have access to a wide range of insurance markets, both locally and overseas. This allows us to secure insurance solutions for even the most complex and hard-to-place risks.

Compliance - Insurance is often a key regulatory requirement, and our breadth of experience allows us to advise you on crucial changes and how they may impact your business.

Risk Management - In a hardening insurance market, risk management is crucial to securing your ongoing insurability and reducing your claims exposure. We can work with you to develop specific risk mitigation strategies.

Claims Handling - Insurance claims can be both complex and time consuming. We have a dedicated in-house claims team that allows you to focus on ensuring your business runs smoothly, while advocating for your best outcome.

Secure your financial future with Ideal Cover, the premier insurance brokerage specialising in personal insurance coverage in Australia. We are your gateway to reliable income protection, TPD (Total and Permanent Disability), trauma, and life insurance.

You can trust that your financial well-being is our top priority, guiding you through the insurance process, and providing ongoing support when you need it most.

Name: Strategi Builder
Description:
The Strategi Builder was created on a simple belief: the future of insurance is not just transactional, it is transformational.

Founded by Marianne Halvorsen, a 20-year industry strategist recognized for bridging human insight with market intelligence, the firm blends personal connection, deep market expertise, and modern data intelligence to bring clarity to a complex world.

At its core, The Strategi Builder is powered by a hybrid model: human strategy amplified by data precision. Through advanced AI-supported research and analysis, the firm elevates advisory work to a new standard, transforming how companies identify risk, design protection, and grow with confidence.

Through strategic partnerships with leading wholesale markets, specialized brokerage relationships, and direct collaboration with insurance carriers, The Strategi Builder delivers access to tailored coverage solutions with efficiency, transparency, and purpose. Every solution is crafted with foresight, balancing protection with possibility, ensuring clients are not just insured but empowered.

Mission
To redefine the role of the insurance advisor by merging the art of strategy with the science of intelligence. The Strategi Builder stands for integrity, innovation, and impact, serving as the bridge between today’s uncertainty and tomorrow’s growth.

Vision
To build a future where brokers, business leaders, and innovators align through trust, technology, and timeless human values, creating strategies that do not simply protect companies but shape legacies.

Name: Pion Seguros
Description:
Bem-vindo à Pion Seguros!

Na Pion Seguros, estamos comprometidos em proporcionar tranquilidade e segurança para nossos clientes, oferecendo soluções personalizadas e inovadoras no mercado de seguros e planos de saúde. Fundada com a missão de ir além das expectativas, nossa corretora se destaca por sua abordagem centrada no cliente, expertise sólida e compromisso inabalável com a excelência.

Na Pion Seguros, a inovação está no centro de tudo o que fazemos. Estamos constantemente buscando novas maneiras de aprimorar nossos serviços, utilizando tecnologia de ponta para simplificar processos e tornar a experiência do cliente ainda mais conveniente e eficiente.

Nossa visão é ser reconhecida como líder no mercado de seguros, não apenas pela qualidade de nossos serviços, mas também pela verdadeira diferença que fazemos na vida de nossos clientes. Estamos aqui para ser mais do que apenas uma corretora de seguros; estamos aqui para ser seu parceiro confiável e de confiança em todos os aspectos relacionados à proteção e segurança.

Junte-se a nós e descubra como podemos ajudá-lo a proteger o que é mais importante para você.

We strive to create a positive impact on society by empowering individuals to secure their financial future and protect the well-being of their loved ones through insurance. Our ultimate goal is to build a community of successful and fulfilled individuals who can make a difference in the lives of others.

If you are a motivated individual with a passion for helping others and have a desire to build a successful career in the insurance industry, IAA is the place for you. Contact us today to learn more about our training program and supportive network, and how we can help you achieve your dreams.

Name: Satori Insurance Agency
Description:
Satori Insurance Agency is a forward-thinking and purpose-driven insurance intermediary based in Kenya. We serve individuals, families, SMEs, corporates, and institutions with tailored insurance and financial solutions—offering far more than just policy placement.

At Satori, “Beyond Insurance” is more than a tagline—it defines our way of working. We are here to demystify insurance, advocate for our clients, and walk with them through every step of the insurance journey, especially when it matters most.

Founded by a skilled insurance underwriter and a seasoned insurance lawyer with over a decade of experience in legal claims handling, Satori brings together deep technical knowledge and legal insight. This unique combination allows us to support our clients not only in buying the right cover but also in navigating complex claims, including reviewing and resolving repudiated or denied claims.

We are equally passionate about financial sustainability and intergenerational wealth. Through services such as trust fund setup, investment linking (including money markets), and risk advisory with ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) alignment, we help our clients protect and grow what matters most—now and for generations to come.

Name: Chadwick Health
Description:
The Private Medical Insurance People.

We specialise in helping individuals, families, and businesses with private medical insurance and employee benefits.

Our vision is to raise the bar on service standards by providing exceptional, year-round support and helping those we believe are too often underserved in this market.

How can we help?

If you’ve received your new policy documentation and are unhappy with the increase, uncertain about the benefits, have questions regarding how your policy works, or simply want to ensure you're getting the best options at the most competitive prices, we are here to help.

Alternatively, if you’re not receiving the service you expect from your current broker—whether it’s due to poor communication, delayed responses, or a one-size-fits-all approach—or if you're not working with a broker and feel unsupported by your insurer, we offer a better solution.

At Chadwick Health, we take the time to understand your needs. Once we have a clear picture of your situation, we search the market to find the most suitable options. After securing the right policy for you, our commitment to exceptional service continues year-round.

We are always ready to answer your questions and offer prompt, informed guidance, with a goal of same-day responses. We also handle the administrative tasks of your policy throughout the year, removing the stress and frustration of managing it yourself.

You can rely on us to be just a call or email away, providing continuous support whenever you need it—giving you peace of mind with experts who truly care.

Name: ASSOCIACIÓ CLUB CATALÀ DE CORREDORS D'ASSEGURANCES
Description:
El Club Català de Corredors d’Assegurances (CCC) es una asociación profesional fundada en 1991 que agrupa corredores y corredurías de seguros independientes de Cataluña.
Su misión es fortalecer el papel del mediador como asesor experto, de confianza y cercano al cliente, promoviendo la colaboración, la formación continua y la defensa de los intereses comunes del sector.

El CCC actúa como punto de encuentro entre corredores, compañías y entidades, impulsando proyectos que mejoran la competitividad, la digitalización y el cumplimiento normativo de las corredurías. La asociación promueve una mediación moderna, pero fiel a sus valores tradicionales: independencia, transparencia, servicio personalizado y responsabilidad hacia el cliente.

Entre sus principales servicios destacan:
• Acceso a acuerdos preferentes con compañías aseguradoras y proveedores.
• Programas de formación técnica y normativa para profesionales de la mediación.
• Herramientas tecnológicas que facilitan la gestión eficiente de la correduría.
• Asesoramiento y representación institucional ante administraciones y organismos reguladores.
• Actividades de networking, jornadas y encuentros para compartir experiencias y buenas prácticas.

Con más de tres décadas de trayectoria, el CCC se ha consolidado como una voz de referencia en el sector asegurador catalán, defendiendo una mediación profesional, próxima y orientada al futuro.
Una asociación que cree en la fuerza del colectivo y en el valor añadido que el mediador aporta a la sociedad.

Name: Agenzia Generale Allianz Trade della Campania
Description:
Allianz Trade è il marchio utilizzato per identificare i servizi forniti da Euler Hermes.

Siamo leader globali nell'assicurazione dei crediti commerciali e specialisti riconosciuti nei settori delle cauzioni, del recupero crediti e del rischio politico. Da oltre un secolo, aiutiamo le aziende ad anticipare i rischi, a prendere decisioni informate e a crescere in modo sicuro.
 
L'atteggiamento degli Imprenditori, rispetto ad una proposta di copertura assicurativa dei crediti commerciali, con il passare del tempo si è trasformato da mera curiosità in scelta; questo è dovuto principalmente ad un passato recente, determinato dalla crescente diffusione del prodotto e dalla puntualità della prestazione assicurativa offerta.

La congiuntura favorevole che spinge oggi le imprese del Napoletano verso l'acquisizione di nuove posizioni, a volte si concretizza anche nella consapevolezza di affrontare con i nuovi mercati, una alea di rischio non quantificabile, tuttavia, il nostro obiettivo è quello di sostenere l'imprenditore oltre la continuità del contatto che l'Agenzia stabilisce con l'Azienda assicurata. Assistenza post-vendita e capacità di assorbire e gestire alcune criticità, garantiscono all'Imprenditore la serena consapevolezza di aver scelto il partner migliore e certamente il più affidabile.

Name: Vérisanté
Description:
Vérisanté est un courtier d’assurances généraliste à destination des particuliers et des professionnels.

Pourquoi faire appel à Vérisanté ?
Le marché de l’assurance est en constante évolution, les réglementations sont complexes et il est parfois difficile de s’y retrouver.
Faire appel à Vérisanté permet un gain de temps et de bénéficier de conseils avisés pour simplifier la compréhension des produits et faciliter toutes les étapes de la vie du contrat.
Grâce à notre connaissance du marché, notre expertise et notre principe de neutralité et d’indépendance vis-à-vis des compagnies avec lesquelles nous travaillons, nous sommes à l’écoute de nos clients pour comprendre leur(s) besoin(s) et leur proposer la meilleure solution.

Notre histoire :
Créée en 2010, Vérisanté s’est, au départ, spécialisée dans les assurances de personnes. Notre premier métier était l’accompagnement des mandataires (assureurs indépendants) en négociant des accords auprès des compagnies d’assurances afin qu’ils puissent distribuer les offres incontournables du marché dans les conditions les plus favorables.
En 10 ans, l’entreprise a su se doter du 1er réseau d’agents MIA avec une centaine de partenaires au national.
La crise sanitaire de 2020 est venue bouleverser notre métier et nous a contraint à très fortement évoluer pour durer.
Nous avons développé un nouveau business model en vente à distance qui nous permet aujourd’hui de courter des solutions en assurances santé, prévoyance, auto/moto, habitation, emprunteur et assurances professionnelles adaptées aux besoins de nos clients.

2022 est un nouveau tournant de notre histoire :
- Renfort de nos équipes avec la création du service relation client pour mieux traiter toutes les demandes
- Création d’un poste d’Happiness Manager pour le bien-être de tous nos collaborateurs
- Ouverture d’une nouvelle antenne commerciale à Manosque pour agrandir le bassin d’emploi

Notre crédo : mettre l’humain au cœur de notre métier !

• Contrairement au conseiller de vente lié à une société d’assurances (également appelé représentant ou agent d’assurances), nous agissons en indépendant pour nos clients et ne dépendons ni juridiquement ni économiquement d’un assureur.

Vi er en af de selvstændige GF-forsikringsklubber, der sammen med GF Fonden ejer GF Forsikring. som er et af Danmarks største medlemsejede forsikringsselskaber. Og med et vidt forgrenet net af lokale medlemskontorer er GF i dag “landsdækkende lokale”.  
 
Hos GF Hovedstaden er vi meget bevidste om, at vores medlemmer i sidste ende er vores ejere. Det forpligter os til at yde personlig rådgivning og service – og til at være en attraktiv arbejdsplads, fordi vi ved, at gode medlemsoplevelser skabes af dygtige og engagerede medarbejdere.  
På denne side kan du følge de vigtigste nyheder om nye tiltag, viden om forsikring, gode råd og ledige stillinger hos os i GF Hovedstaden. 
Vi ønsker at fremme vidensdeling og en konstruktiv dialog om de emner, vi berører her på LinkedIn. Vi forbeholder os ret til at slette kommentarer, der ikke har noget med det pågældende opslag at gøre, eller som indeholder gentagen negativ retorik.

Vi glæder os til at møde dig og din virksomhed her på LinkedIn.

Nati nel 1999 sulla base solida di un'azienda e un nome sinonimo di serietà e sicurezza, abbiamo rafforzato la nostra capillarità all'interno della distribuzione sarda dei materiali elettrici, allargando la nostra offerta tecnologica
a tipologie di prodotti quali l'illuminazione e la protezione elettrica in genere .
La nostra lealtà professionale unita alla competenza tecnica nelle materie da noi promosse e approfondite, ci ha fortemente accreditati in un settore competitivo ed estremamente esigente, costituito da professionisti in tutte le sue varie forme e anelli di mercato : - progettazione - distribuzione  - installazione.  Il nostro successo è quindi derivato,
Oltre che dalle nostre capacità, da tutti coloro che in noi hanno visto e tuttora vedono un' azienda sempre in crescita e immancabilmente puntuale e affidabile .
Dal 2021 la Fanti Rappresentanze e' certificata KNX PARTNER, con l'intento di sostenere e divulgare, per mezzo dei prodotti rappresentati, lo standard mondiale KNX.

Name: EBS Insurance Consulting Partners, Inc.
Description:
EBS Insurance Consulting Partners is a modern employee benefits firm built on one core belief: better outcomes come from alignment. When employers, advisors, and employees work toward a shared goal, benefits perform better—and businesses do too.

We know the challenge. Employers want to grow and improve profitability while taking care of their workforce. Yet healthcare costs continue to rise, leaving many with what feels like no real choice: pay more, reduce benefits, or limit access to care.

We reject that tradeoff.

At EBS, we help employers move beyond the status quo and turn benefit spend into measurable value.

Choose Kinsure for insurance that goes beyond coverage—choose us for assurance, clarity, and a partner dedicated to protecting your future. With Kinsure, you’re not just insured; you’re “Sure to Protect.”

Na Arkos, focamos em casos complexos e de alto risco, que frequentemente enfrentam dificuldades de aceitação ou podem gerar custos adicionais (agravos). Atuamos em diversas modalidades, incluindo planos de saúde, seguros empresariais, de vida, responsabilidade civil e garantias contratuais.
Com uma visão abrangente de todo o ecossistema — desde o credenciamento de uma rede satisfatória até o atendimento personalizado e um pós-venda próximo e humano —, acompanhamos todas as etapas e vidas envolvidas em seus processos. Esteja em momentos de conquista ou diante de imprevistos, estaremos sempre presentes.
Nossa fundadora possui mais de 15 anos de experiência no mercado de seguros e consultorias, conectando médicos, seguradoras, redes hospitalares e, principalmente, você.
Somos especialistas em adequações e soluções que proporcionam tranquilidade, minimizam perdas e mitigam parcial ou totalmente impactos financeiros. Estamos prontos para oferecer uma nova experiência em seguros.
Nossa missão vai além do contrato! De acordo com a SUSEP e as autarquias de seguros, o corretor é uma peça-chave que o conduzirá a uma negociação bem-sucedida em todas as pontas. Além disso, o corretor de seguros será seu representante junto às companhias durante todo o período do seu contrato.

A escolha do corretor certo é o fator predominante para o sucesso da sua contratação. Nossa missão é exercer com excelência esse papel, garantindo sempre tranquilidade, segurança e saúde integral, seja ela física, mental, do ambiente e até financeira.

Name: VUW.ai
Description:
VUW.ai is transforming the insurance industry by offering a state-of-the-art, AI-powered platform designed to enhance underwriting accuracy, profitability, and efficiency. In a world where insurance companies face fluctuating risks and volatile markets, VUW.ai provides a competitive edge through its advanced analytics and real-time portfolio optimisation capabilities.

Why VUW.ai?

Smarter Decisions: Leveraging AI, VUW.ai analyzes diverse portfolios in real-time, offering actionable insights that help insurers make smarter, data-driven decisions. This allows them to mirror top-performing syndicates all the while optimising risk selection.

Faster Execution: With automated processes and a low-cost workbench, VUW.ai speeds up underwriting, binding, and claims management. This streamlines operations, reduces rekeying, and creates a seamless audit trail, saving both time and resources.

Predictable Outcomes: By improving portfolio performance and lowering volatility, VUW.ai enhances profitability. Its predictive models have consistently outperformed traditional methods, as evidenced by its superior returns compared to Lloyd’s market over recent years.

For Insurers: VUW.ai offers greater diversification, new distribution channels, and enhanced portfolio performance. It helps insurers focus on the best risks, leading to improved outcomes.

For Brokers: The platform simplifies workflows by enabling digital binding, signing, and endorsement. centralised claims management and digital audit trails further enhance operational efficiency.

Join the future of insurance with VUW.ai - where smarter, faster, and more predictable underwriting becomes the new standard.

Name: Insurance Resources
Description:
Insurance Resources opened for business in August 1999 and was created to provide a niche market for coastal homeowner’s insurance and other difficult to place lines of insurance throughout Florida.

Along with providing homeowners insurance, our agency also offers other personal lines insurance, such as auto, flood, boat, and life insurance, and business and association insurance through a variety of admitted markets and brokers.

Insurance Resources is a Trusted Choice independent insurance agency and a member of the national Strategic Independent Agents Alliance (SIAA), and local affiliation, Strategic Agency Network (SAN) of Florida. This partnership enables us to access numerous insurance markets for risk placement.

We are also proud to be members of the Community Association Institute (CAI), Florida Association of Insurance Agents (FAIA), the Independent Insurance Agents and Brokers of America (IIABA), the St. Petersburg Chamber of Commerce, and the Tampa Bay Beaches Chamber of Commerce.

Insurance Resources believes in giving back to the local Pinellas county community that has supported the agency over the past 20 years. Through our initiative, Insurance Resources Outreach, our agency has supported great organizations such as Alpha House, Angel Tree, CASA, Ronnie’s Run, and other local causes.
At Insurance Resources we strive to educate and empower each one of our clients so they can make sound insurance and risk management decisions. By putting our client’s needs first, our agents develop optimal insurance solutions which gives our clients peace of mind.

Name: GF MidtVest (GF Forsikring)
Description:
GF MidtVest har kontor i Hammerum og forsikrer både privatpersoner og virksomheder i det midtjyske og vest på. GF står for ”Gruppe Forsikring”, fordi vi er tæt på medlemmerne, som vi deler årets overskud med.  #overskudtilhinanden 
 
Vi er en af de selvstændige GF-forsikringsklubber, der sammen med GF Fonden ejer GF Forsikring. som er et af Danmarks største medlemsejede forsikringsselskaber. Og med et vidt forgrenet net af lokale medlemskontorer er GF i dag “landsdækkende lokale”.  
 
Hos GF MidtVest er vi meget bevidste om, at vores medlemmer i sidste ende er vores ejere. Det forpligter os til at yde personlig rådgivning og service – og til at være en attraktiv arbejdsplads, fordi vi ved, at gode medlemsoplevelser skabes af dygtige og engagerede medarbejdere.  
På denne side kan du følge de vigtigste nyheder om nye tiltag, viden om forsikring, gode råd og ledige stillinger hos os i GF MidtVest. 
Vi ønsker at fremme vidensdeling og en konstruktiv dialog om de emner, vi berører her på LinkedIn. Vi forbeholder os ret til at slette kommentarer, der ikke har noget med det pågældende opslag at gøre, eller som indeholder gentagen negativ retorik. 
Vi glæder os til at møde dig og din virksomhed her på LinkedIn.

Name: Insurance With Purpose Agency, Inc.
Description:
At Insurance With Purpose Agency (IWP), we offer insurance solutions tailored to the specific needs of commercial contractors in fields such as construction, oil & gas, industrial, and wet marine, as well as manufacturers, wholesalers, and distribution businesses. We believe that effective insurance is more than a policy; it’s about structuring coverage that aligns with your risk tolerance and long-term objectives.

Who We Serve:
We partner with businesses spending $100,000 to $10,000,000 in annual premiums and looking for a measured approach to insurance. Whether you are a commercial contractor seeking reliable coverage or a manufacturer or distributor focused on protecting people, assets, and reputation, we provide solutions designed to address the needs of your industry.

Our Approach:
Through a focus on transparent assessments and thoughtful coverage structures, we work to enhance the protection of your business.

Detailed Risk Analysis:
We help identify critical exposures and present your risk management practices to underwriters to better position your business.

Contract Compliance & Insurance Review:
We offer guidance on the insurance requirements within subcontractor agreements, support certificate tracking, and advise on coverage structures to manage risk appropriately.

Claims & Experience Modifier Analysis:
Claims can affect premiums, so we monitor claims trends and experience modifiers to help manage costs and mitigate future impacts.

Audit Preparation & Support:
Annual audits can influence premiums, and our team provides support for thorough preparation, helping to minimize unnecessary expenses.

At IWP, we strive to be more than an insurance agency. Our consultative approach is designed to help you create a secure, resilient operation, allowing you to focus confidently on growth.

Connect with us to learn how we can bring purpose and precision to your insurance strategy.

Name: Seamless Health Indemnity Plan
Description:
Seamless Health is a modern-day health collective whose mission is to provide all-inclusive, affordable, accessible, and accountable medical care that leverages world-class technology to elevate the patient experience.

We are driven to create a new standard of inequitable coverage, adding more value to the ecosystem of providers, employers, and employees, while reducing costs. 

Our experience is our foundation:
The health of a business is deeply connected to the health of its employees. For businesses to function well, they need a healthy, engaged, and productive workforce as well as predictable, controllable costs. 

The team at Seamless Health Indemnity Plan has over 100+ years of combined experience in healthcare and entrepreneurship. With this as our foundation, we’ve developed a plan that takes into account the needs of its members and their employers. 

Why our model works
Access to care helps members get timely treatment for illnesses, reducing the potential costs of worsening illnesses as well as emergency room visits. Unnecessary ER visits cost $32  billion a year. A trip to the ER is on average 12 times more costly than being treated at a physician’s office. By offering patients easier access and integrating other aspects of their care—including prescriptions, claim management, and other services—members will experience better care, which often ends up being less expensive care.

Most health plans are inefficient and ineffective
Currently, members in health plans must wade through lists of doctors in different locations, who may or may not have the capacity to see them, often at a time when members are already managing healthcare and other life challenges. Not only are they asked to find the appropriate provider, but they must also identify locations, set up appointments, and then find time to get to those appointments, including any follow-ups. 

Having a concierge in place removes these tasks from the member’s plate and eases the way to better care.

Versicherungen: Individuelle Absicherung durch Lebens-, Renten-, Berufsunfähigkeits-, Unfall- und Krankenversicherungen sowie umfassende Beratung zu Sach- und Vermögensversicherungen wie KFZ-, Haftpflicht-, Hausrat-, Wohngebäude- und Rechtsschutzversicherungen.

Immobilien: Begleitung beim Verkauf Ihrer Immobilie von der Bewertung bis zum Vertragsabschluss, Unterstützung bei der Vermietung durch Mietersuche, Bonitätsprüfung und Vertragsgestaltung sowie Verwaltung Ihres Sondereigentums inklusive Mieterauswahl, Instandhaltungsmaßnahmen und Erstellung der jährlichen Nebenkostenabrechnung.

Finanzanlagen: Wir unterstützen Sie bei der Auswahl der passenden Finanzanlagen, die auf Ihre Wünsche hinsichtlich Rendite, Verfügbarkeit und Sicherheit abgestimmt sind.  Zudem beraten wir Sie gerne, wenn werteorientierte Anlagen (z.B. ESG-Kriterien) für Sie von Bedeutung sind, und helfen Ihnen, eine nachhaltige Anlagestrategie zu entwickeln, die zu Ihren Zielen passt.

Bausparen & Baufinanzierungen: Unterstützung beim Aufbau von Eigenkapital durch Bausparlösungen mit gesicherten Zinssätzen und maßgeschneiderte Finanzierungslösungen für Bau- oder Kaufvorhaben in Zusammenarbeit mit verschiedenen Finanzierungspartnern.

Unsere Beratung ist unverbindlich und kostenlos – wir arbeiten auf Provisionsbasis. Profitieren Sie von unserer langjährigen Erfahrung und unserem umfassenden Netzwerk mit renommierten Finanz- und Versicherungspartnern.

Designing a plan takes time, knowledge and experience - this will either save a company money in the long run or will cause the premiums to go up quite a bit. 

Another area that separates from our competition has to do with servicing our clients regularly. We help with the claims and administration. Our clients know that if they are having an issue with admin. to just call us and will we take it from there. 

We help our clients save money and have a stress-free experience with their plans. We'll even deal with their employees so that the owners or HR people won't have to be bothered by the task of dealing with the claims. 

Our Philosophy
Being Benefit Plan Consultants and Brokers, is not just a job, it’ a meaningful part of our life. We take pride serving and helping you our clients reach their goals.

Our success is only based on you, our client being 100% satisfied with our service making sure that you have the best plan, best cost, and no administration stress.

We’ve learned that communication is one of the best traits a company like ours can have.  Not only to return calls promptly, but building rapport, being congruent and having the ability to build long term relationships. In other words, speaking the same language.

Name: Oakridge Capital Services
Description:
Oakridge Capital Services is a privately held American holding company operating in insurance and capital allocation. The firm is structured around two pillars: an insurance division, which provides mortgage protection and equity protection to families, and a capital division, which allocates surplus revenue into assets designed to generate compounded growth. Insurance functions as the operating engine, while capital allocation serves as the strategic foundation.

After reserve requirements are met, surplus capital is deployed into credit and yield vehicles that support businesses and markets. This structure enables Oakridge to sustain long-term growth while strengthening its balance sheet and expanding its role as a financial intermediary.

The company culture emphasizes discipline and efficiency, avoiding unnecessary bureaucracy. Oakridge brokers drive revenue on the front end, while the firm compounds earnings on the back end through systematic allocation practices.

Oakridge Capital Services defines its mission as threefold: to protect clients through insurance solutions, to grow capital reserves through prudent investment, and to contribute positively to the community.

Name: Actual Broker Consulting
Description:
Il nostro nome racchiude la nostra filosofia. ABC non è solo un acronimo, ma il manifesto del nostro impegno quotidiano. L'espressione "essere l'ABC di qualcosa" significa rappresentare le fondamenta, i principi elementari ma essenziali su cui costruire valore duraturo.

Per noi di ABC Broker, questo significa essere semplici e fondamentali. Ogni nostra azione si basa su tre pilastri che garantiscono efficacia, trasparenza e risultati concreti:

ACTUAL la nostra analisi è ACTUAL nel senso inglese del termine: basata su ciò che è reale, verificabile e dimostrabile, non su ipotesi o percezioni. Allo stesso tempo è anche attuale nel senso italiano: aggiornata, pertinente e in linea con le condizioni del momento. In questo modo ogni decisione si fonda su elementi reali—actual—e su valutazioni aggiornate-attuali-offrendo una protezione coerente con ciò che il cliente è,e con ciò che affronta ogni giorno.

BROKER il brokeraggio, per noi, significa creare equilibrio. Non è solo individuare la copertura più adatta al cliente, né esclusivamente selezionare i rischi più corretti per le compagnie. E un'attività tecnica e responsabile che richiede analisi, coerenza e rispetto delle esigenze di entrambe le parti. Il nostro approccio non spinge verso la polizza più ampia né verso la tariffa più bassa: definiamo un punto di incontro che funzioni davvero. 

CONSULTING la nostra consulenza non si limita alla presentazione di prodotti assicurativi: è un servizio professionale fondato su metodo, competenze interne e una lettura chiara delle esigenze operative dei nostri partner. Il nostro valore nasce dalla formazione continua dei consulenti, figure interne specializzate che conoscono a fondo le dinamiche assicurative e le applicano con
rigore, coerenza e responsabilità.

La passione che nutriamo per il nostro lavoro è il motore che ci ha permesso di costruire relazioni autentiche, solide e durature, che vanno oltre la semplice dimensione professionale.

Name: Pro-Tier
Description:
Pro-Tier delivers a more flexible, affordable, and personalized benefits solution.

Instead of being locked into traditional group insurance, employers provide workers with subsidies to purchase their own benefits. This approach gives businesses full control over their contributions, while employees gain access to top plans at the best prices.

The only platform that adapts benefits to hours worked.

Pro-Tier is the first solution that lets companies tie benefits directly to the number of hours an employee works—finally making it possible to extend fair, proportional benefits to hourly and part-time staff.

Empowering employees, strengthening businesses.

Unlike brokers or insurance companies, Pro-Tier facilitates employee subsidies, giving workers the freedom to choose benefits that best fit their individual or family needs. The result: stronger talent attraction and retention, smoother operations, higher profitability, and full compliance with federal and state regulations.

Proven success in industries with diverse workforces.

We’ve seen especially strong results in Fitness and Hospitality—sectors with salaried, contract, hourly, and seasonal workers across multiple sites. On average, Pro-Tier clients reduce employee turnover by over 30%—a powerful measure of employee satisfaction. Simply put, healthy, happy employees make for stronger businesses.

A full spectrum of benefits, at no cost to employers or workers.

Through Pro-Tier, employees can access Affordable Care Act (ACA/Obamacare) healthcare, vision, dental, childcare, retirement savings, and private market plans. The platform is free for businesses and employees, with revenue generated through partnerships with carriers and providers. Plus, employer contributions remain tax-deductible, and employee subsidies are tax-free.

Name: NII AfCFTA Committee
Description:
About Us – NII-AfCFTA Committee

The Nigerian Insurance Industry Committee on African Continental Free Trade Area (NII-AfCFTA Committee) was established by the National Insurance Commission (NAICOM) to drive Nigeria’s insurance industry’s strategic integration into the AfCFTA framework. Our goal is to enhance competitiveness, expand market access, and position the sector as a key player in Africa’s single market.

With AfCFTA fostering deeper economic integration, the insurance industry plays a crucial role in supporting industrialization, economic diversification, and trade facilitation. The NII-AfCFTA Committee collaborates with the AfCFTA Secretariat, policymakers, regulators, and industry stakeholders to ensure regulatory alignment, drive innovation, and unlock new opportunities for Nigerian insurers.

Our Key Objectives:

 Facilitate Nigeria’s insurance sector’s seamless integration into AfCFTA
 Advocate for policies that promote regulatory harmonization and competitiveness
 Enhance market access and expand business opportunities across Africa
 Drive capacity building, innovation, and digital transformation in insurance
 Support economic growth by providing risk management solutions for businesses and trade

Through proactive policy engagement, stakeholder collaboration, and strategic initiatives, we are committed to ensuring Nigeria’s insurance industry thrives within AfCFTA’s evolving landscape. Our vision is to build a well-integrated, resilient, and globally competitive insurance sector that drives sustainable economic development across Africa.

Join us as we shape the future of insurance in Africa.

Name: Adad Sigorta
Description:
Dünyanın dört bir yanındaki şirketlere birinci sınıf sigorta hizmetleri sağlama konusunda 30 yılı aşkın deneyime sahip olduğumuz sigorta şirketimize hoş geldiniz. Mükemmellik konusundaki itibarımız ve olağanüstü müşteri hizmeti sunma taahhüdümüzle gurur duyuyoruz.
Adad Sigorta Aracılık Hizmetleri Ltd. Şti adı ile yeni olmasına rağmen sigortacılık sektöründe 30 yıl acentelik ve yöneticilik yapmış olan Sayın  Gülbin Gürtekin ve  20 Yılı aşkın süredir, denizcilik camiasında bir fiil varlığını gösteren  Adad Uluslararası Denizcilik Taşıma Hiz. Ltd.Şti  tek ortağı olan Sayın M. Cem AKAN’ın  deneyim ve güçlerini birleştirmek üzere yaptıkları ortaklık yapısıdır.
  Yıllar boyunca, sigorta endüstrisini içten ve dıştan anlayan uzman profesyonellerden oluşan bir ekip oluşturmak için çok çalıştık. Yaptığımız işe tutkuyla bağlıyız ve kendimizi müşterilerimizin riskleri azaltmalarına ve varlıklarını korumalarına yardımcı olmaya en önemlisi çözüm odaklı olmaya adadık.
Şirketimizde sigortanın kolay ve stressiz olması gerektiğine inanıyoruz. Bu nedenle, süreçlerimizi düzene sokmak ve müşterilerimizin ihtiyaç duydukları teminatı almalarını kolaylaştırmak için çok çalıştık. Uzun yıllardır her ölçekten ve sektörden şirketle çalışmış, projeler üretmiş  ve işletmelerin karşılaştığı benzersiz sorunları çözümlemiş olduğumuzdan, ihtiyaçlarınızı anlamak ve sizin için işe yarayan özelleştirilmiş bir sigorta planı oluşturarak , müşteriye kişiselleştirilmiş bir yaklaşım izleyebiliyoruz.
  Ekibimiz, müşterilerimizin başarılı olmasına yardımcı olma konusunda tutkulu olan deneyimli profesyonellerden oluşmaktadır. 
 
İletişimin anahtar, doğruluk ve dürüstlüğün yolumuz olduğuna inanıyoruz ve sorularınızı yanıtlamak, ihtiyacınız olduğunda rehberlik sağlamak için her zaman buradayız.
İşletmenizi korumanıza ve hedeflerinize ulaşmanıza nasıl yardımcı olabileceğimiz hakkında daha fazla bilgi edinmek için bugün bize ulaşın.

Name: ČSOB Pojišťovací makléř
Description:
Patříme mezi přední makléřské společnosti v České republice.  

Zajišťujeme pro klienty komplexní pojištění průmyslu a podnikatelů, od pojištění majetku a odpovědnosti přes pojištění strojů a vozidel až po pojištění kybernetických rizik, pohledávek či pojištění odpovědnosti statutárních orgánů. 

Nabízíme pojistné programy přímo na míru klientům, včetně řízení pojistných rizik a likvidace pojistných událostí. 

Spolupracujeme se všemi významnými tuzemskými pojistiteli a také s řadou zahraničních pojistitelů.

Jsme experty na zprostředkování neživotního pojištění, zejména havarijního a strojního pojištění, pojištění odpovědnosti za újmu způsobenou provozem vozidla a dalších doplňkových pojištění, a to nejen k finančním produktům společnosti ČSOB Leasing. Pečujeme odborně o pojištění financovaných movitých věcí v rámci skupinových pojistných smluv ČSOB Leasing, zejména pak automobilů, motocyklů, strojů a zařízení (i jako součást nemovitosti), technologií, IT zařízení (hardware) a nestandardních předmětů financování (vagony, letadla, lodě). Poskytujeme také služby v oblasti součinnosti při likvidaci pojistných událostí.

Zajišťujeme komplexní služby v rámci zprostředkování pojištění nejen pro mateřskou společnost ČSOB Leasing a její klienty, ale také pro klienty skupiny ČSOB a také klienty vlastní, a to napříč celým zákaznickým spektrem.

Name: Premium Direct
Description:
Premium direct d.o.o. osnovan je 2013. godine kao nezavisna agencija za pružanje osigurateljnih usluga koja je okupila proaktivni tim stručanjaka s višegodišnjim iskustvom , te se kroz godine poslovanja specijalizirala prema fizičkim i pravnim osobama. U svome poslu pokušavamo biti drugačiji i opravdati povjerenje koje su nam ukazali dugogodišnji klijenti i najveći hrvatski osiguratelji.

Danas osiguranje možete ugovoriti na puno različitih načina, ali postoje vrlo dobri razlozi zašto odabrati naše usluge.  Mi smo svjeseni činjenice kako naši klijenti nemaju vremena, potrebne informacije i znanja kako bi odabrali njima optimalan program osiguranja, a upravo je naš posao da na razumljiv način kroz besplatnu analizu prema potrebama i mogućnostima pružimo najbolja osigurateljna rješenja.

Naši djelatnici su stručne i kvalificirane osobe s iskustvom na području osiguranja te posjeduju licencu izdanu od strane Hrvatske agencije za obavljanje financijskih usluga (HANFA), a za svoj posao garantiramo i policom profesionalne odgovornosti s limitom pokrića od 9.700.000,00 HRK po štetnom događaju.

Bez obzira da li vam je potreban savjet oko auto osiguranja, osiguranja imovine ili pomoć oko izbora životnog i zdravstvenog osiguranja, stojimo vam na raspolaganju!

Vous avez un projet immobilier ? Des assurances à challenger ?

On s'occupe de tout ! 

Vous avez un projet immobilier en tête ? Vous souhaitez acheter une maison, un appartement, ou faire construire ?

Félicitations ! L'achat d'un bien immobilier est une étape importante dans la vie, qui peut être complexe et stressante. 

Il y a beaucoup de choses à penser, et il est facile de se perdre dans les détails. 

C'est là que nous intervenons. 

Notre cabinet de courtage en assurances et crédit immobilier est là pour vous aider à concrétiser votre projet immobilier en toute sérénité. 

Nous négocions pour vous les meilleurs tarifs et garanties auprès de nos partenaires assureurs et banquiers. 

Notre objectif ? 

Que vous obteniez les meilleures conditions possibles, adaptées à votre situation et à votre budget. 

Nous vous accompagnons tout au long de votre projet, de la phase de recherche à la signature de l'acte de vente. 

Nous vous aidons à choisir le bien immobilier et la solution de financement les plus adaptés à vos besoins, en vous apportant notre expertise et notre conseil, et en vous accompagnant dans votre réflexion. 

Pour un projet immobilier réussi, il est essentiel de nous consulter dès le départ. 

Nous vous aidons à réaliser une étude de faisabilité et à établir un budget prévisionnel. 

Cette attestation de faisabilité rassurera votre agent immobilier ou maître d'œuvre, et vous permettra de gagner sa confiance. 

Nous vous proposons également une gamme complète de produits d'assurance adaptés à vos besoins, que vous soyez un particulier ou un professionnel. 

Pour les professionnels, nous proposons notamment des assurances :

  Prévoyance - Santé - Retraite

Nous vous aidons à bien identifier vos besoins et à construire ensemble une solution adaptée.
