Name: expat-savvy.ch Switzerland
Description:
Expat Savvy: Simplifying Swiss Insurance for International Residents Since 2017
At Expat Savvy, we bridge the gap between Switzerland's complex insurance landscape and the unique needs of the international community. As FINMA-certified experts based in Zürich, we combine deep knowledge of Swiss insurance systems with a genuine understanding of expatriate challenges.
Our Mission
We empower international residents to make confident insurance decisions in Switzerland. By providing personalized, independent advice, we help you navigate the Swiss insurance market with clarity and peace of mind.
What Sets Us Apart
• Truly Independent: We offer unbiased comparisons across all major Swiss insurance providers, ensuring you find the optimal solution for your specific situation.
• Expatriate Specialists: Our team understands the unique challenges of relocating to Switzerland because we've lived them ourselves.
• Multilingual Expertise: We communicate complex insurance concepts in your language, making the unfamiliar feel accessible.
• No-Cost Consultations: Our advisory services are completely free, with no hidden fees or obligations.
• Holistic Approach: Beyond just health insurance, we provide guidance on all insurance needs for international residents in Switzerland.
Our Services
• Comprehensive health insurance comparisons and recommendations
• Detailed explanations of the Swiss healthcare system
• Assistance with insurance applications and paperwork
• Ongoing support for claims and policy adjustments
• Expert guidance on supplementary insurance options
Whether you're new to Switzerland or looking to optimize your existing coverage, Expat Savvy transforms insurance decisions from overwhelming to straightforward. Our success is measured by the peace of mind we provide to international residents across Switzerland.
Connect with us today to experience insurance advice that's as personalized as your journey in Switzerland.

Name: Ag. Generali Darfo Boario Terme Corso Italia
Description:
L’Agenzia Generale Maffi Sas di Val Camonica (ora Generali Italia - Agenzia Generale
di Darfo Boario Terme Corso Italia) nasce nel 1978, quando un grande gruppo
assicurativo italiano nomina Agente Generale il Cav. Augusto Maffi, affidandogli la
rappresentanza di un territorio vasto come quello della Val Camonica.

L'Agenzia, oggi rappresentata dal Sig. Ezio Maffi (Agente Generale dal 1993) e dal
Sig. Doriano Maffi (Agente Generale dal 2000), ha con l'impegno e la costanza nel
proprio lavoro ottenuto prestigiosi traguardi, arrivando ad essere tra le più
prestigiose Agenzie di Generali Italia (ex brand Toro Assicurazioni).
L’Agenzia, che conta circa 25 professionisti tra Agenti, collaboratori commerciali e
dipendenti, annovera e gestisce nel suo portafoglio oltre sette mila clienti tra privati
ed aziende.
L’Agenzia con Sede Generale a Boario Terme, è presente con diversi uffici sul
territorio della Val Camonica nei comuni di:
Pian camuno, Angolo Terme, Esine, Breno, Cedegolo, Malonno, Edolo.
Professionalità e consulenza mirata, rivolte alla soddisfazione delle esigenze dei
clienti, sono la peculiarità del lavoro svolto nei diversi rami assicurativi quali il Ramo
Auto, il Ramo Danni No Auto, il Ramo Vita, il Ramo Fideiussioni ed infine il Ramo
Tutela Legale.
Conosciamo le persone e siamo diventati per loro un punto di riferimento nella
consulenza assicurativa, dei veri Partner Di Vita.

Name: Agenzia Generale Allianz Trade di Milano Centro
Description:
L’Agenzia Generale Allianz Trade di Milano Centro può contare su un Gruppo giovane e dinamico di 9 professionisti provenienti da esperienze lavorative molto differenti e complementari fra loro.

Oltre ad una lunga esperienza nelle soluzioni per le coperture dal rischio di mancato pagamento dei crediti, alcune Risorse provengono dalla banca e factoring, ex credit manager, area manager nelle informazioni commerciali e da altri rami assicurativi.

Gentilezza, professionalità, capacità di ascolto, di anticipazione e soluzioni smart dei problemi è quanto ci viene riconosciuto dalle Aziende nostre Clienti, che ringraziamo per la loro fiducia pluriennale. 

La comprensione e la crescita del loro business in sicurezza è la nostra soddisfazione.

Questi plus attraggono e conquistano anche le Aziende che si avvicinano a noi per la prima volta e che trovano le soluzioni più moderne, semplici, economiche e su misura alle loro esigenze di crescita e/o di prevenzione e sicurezza nelle controparti commerciali.

Inoltre ci troviamo a due passi dalla sede centrale di Allianz Trade nel cuore del financial district Milanese, e trattandosi di uno spin off direzionale, abbiamo la possibilità di offrire servizi e vantaggi unici ai nostri clienti in modo davvero rapido e smart.

Conosciamo a fondo i bisogni e le necessità di business delle Aziende del territorio in cui anche noi operiamo, e questo ci permette di offrire loro soluzioni flessibili e altamente personalizzate in ambito di assicurazione del credito, cauzioni e recupero del credito.

Permettiamo, insomma, di incrementare le vendite attraverso le soluzioni di protezione del credito da noi offerte. Chiedici come! Saremo lieti di raccontartelo!

Name: BCP Polska
Description:
Rozumiemy Twój Biznes.

Broker Consulting Partners Polska od 2017 roku działa na rynku jako zaufani partnerzy w obszarze ubezpieczeń. Nasze doświadczenie i profesjonalne podejście przekładają się na wyjątkowe zrozumienie specyfiki różnych branż, takich jak: Dealerzy Samochodowi, TSL, Produkcja, Przemysł, Budownictwo oraz Usługi.

Nasza historia jest dowodem na to, że słuchanie potrzeb naszych Klientów przynosi wymierne korzyści - zarówno dla nich, jak i dla nas. W ciągu sześciu lat naszej działalności notujemy stały wzrost obsługiwanej składki, oraz wzrost zatrudnienia osób na stanowiskach seniorskich. Taki dynamiczny rozwój był możliwy dzięki zaangażowaniu naszego zespołu, który z roku na rok się powiększał, dochodząc do 12 specjalistów w dziedzinie ubezpieczeń.

Wierzymy, że kluczem do sukcesu jest zrozumienie biznesu naszych Klientów. Dlatego podchodzimy indywidualnie do każdego zlecenia, dokładnie analizując potrzeby i dostosowując ofertę tak, by jak najlepiej służyła Twojej firmie.

Zapraszamy do współpracy firmy, które cenią sobie profesjonalizm, doświadczenie i indywidualne podejście. Dajemy Ci gwarancję, że z nami Twój biznes będzie w dobrych rękach.

Name: AGEPROSE S.A.
Description:
En AGEPROSE S.A. nuestra misión es asesorar a nuestros clientes y facilitarles la póliza de seguro que más se adecúe a sus necesidades de cobertura actuales y futuras, de modo que contribuyamos a garantizar su seguridad financiera, la de sus dependientes y la protección de sus bienes.

Los seguros son instrumentos de protección financiera sumamente útiles y necesarios para nuestro amparo tanto a nivel individual como colectivo.
 
Por ejemplo, un buen seguro de vida va a proteger a nuestras familias en el peor de los escenarios (si fallecemos los que somos responsables de traer los principales ingresos al hogar), ya que garantizará la continuidad del proyecto de vida que hemos trazado para ellos, es decir, ampara nuestro colectivo, nuestra gente, nuestros hijos. Y, por otro lado, si el escenario que se presenta es el mejor, es decir, termina la cobertura de la póliza y nosotros seguimos con vida, también representa un amparo importante a nivel individual para los dueños de póliza porque con compañías como Pan American Life tenemos la opción de optar a un seguro que tiene un componente significativo de ahorro, mismo que podemos retirar y destinar para un proyecto específico o disfrutar a lo largo de nuestra jubilación.

Personalized Service: We take the time to understand the unique needs of our clients and craft insurance plans that fit their business or lifestyle.
Expertise: Our experienced agents provide knowledgeable advice and reliable support.
Community Focus: As a local business, we are dedicated to the well-being of our community and making a positive impact.

Moving Forward

Whether it's advancing our services, embracing new opportunities, or helping our clients progress in their lives, we believe in the power of forward momentum. At Avanti Ins Solutions, we’re here to protect what matters most and help you navigate the path ahead.

Strategic. Innovative. Committed.

At Elite Benefits of America, we help small and mid-sized companies take back control of their employee benefits programs. For too long, employers have been stuck in the same rinse-and-repeat renewal cycle—higher costs, fewer options, and zero predictability. We change that.

Through our structured Employee Benefits Playbook, we guide employers through a three-stage process to reduce costs, expand coverage, and create more predictable renewals. Somos más que intermediarios; somos un aliado estratégico comprometido en estructurar programas de seguros a la medida que minimicen el impacto económico de eventos inesperados y garanticen la tranquilidad de nuestros clientes.

Riesgos Complejos y Empresariales: Contamos con expertise consolidado en el manejo de riesgos para la industria, transporte de carga y la gestión de fianzas de cumplimiento para contratos con entidades públicas y privadas.

Asesoría a la Medida: Brindamos un servicio integral que incluye evaluación de riesgos, definición de coberturas necesarias, capacidad de negociación ante las aseguradoras y seguimiento continuo de los seguros existentes.

Innovación en Servicio: A pesar de nuestra trayectoria, nos mantenemos a la vanguardia, con procesos internos sistematizados y la implementación de la venta de seguros en línea para una respuesta ágil y eficiente.

Portafolio de Alto Impacto: Nuestro equipo especializado respalda grandes proyectos, ofreciendo soluciones en:

Seguros de Transporte (mercancías, valores, logística).

Fianzas o Cumplimiento (Seriedad de la Oferta, Cumplimiento del Contrato, Calidad, Estabilidad de Obra).

Seguros Generales (Hogar y Empresa).

Seguros de Vehículos y Vida (Individuales y colectivos).

Si su empresa busca no solo una póliza, sino una asesoría robusta y especializada para proteger su capital y proyectos, Aranzazu es su socio ideal.

Matteo e Marta Cominelli con il socio e amico Andrea Carrara hanno creato un progetto innovativo che unisce tradizione e futuro.

I nostri valori:
RADICI | ESPERIENZA | CORRETTEZZA | FUTURO
Ci impegniamo ogni giorno a essere Partner di Vita dei nostri clienti, accompagnandoli nei momenti importanti della loro vita: famiglia, benessere, lavoro, mobilità. 
 Un’Agenzia sostenibile, tecnologica, umana
L’Agenzia Generali Bergamo San Bernardino non è solo un’Agenzia assicurativa. È un ecosistema di persone, tecnologie e servizi progettato per offrire un’esperienza evoluta di relazione e consulenza. Sempre nel rispetto dei nostri valori fondanti: correttezza, attenzione al cliente, responsabilità sociale.
Cosa ci rende unici:
•Un team di agenti giovani che possono contare sulla consulenza esperta di Claudio Cominelli, Vice Direttore Generale di Assicurazioni Generali, per garantire continuità e innovazione
•Figure professionali trasversali, da consulenti del lavoro a fiscalisti e consulenti finanziari
•Laboratorio interno di Innovazione & Sviluppo per l’utilizzo dell’Intelligenza Artificiale nella customer experience
•Sede di proprietà in Via San Bernardino 139/c a Bergamo, da cui l’Agenzia prende il nome, con spazi flessibili e intelligenti nel rispetto della sostenibilità ambientale
•Eventi e iniziative sul territorio per promuovere la cultura assicurativa e coinvolgere la comunità

İşyeri ve Kurumsal Sigortalar: İşletmenizi, çalışanlarınızı ve ticari faaliyetlerinizi teminat altına alın.

Sağlık ve Tamamlayıcı Sağlık Sigortası: Kendinizin ve sevdiklerinizin sağlık giderlerini en uygun şartlarla karşılayın.

Nakliyat ve Allrisk Sigortaları: Ticari faaliyetlerinizi ve taşımacılık süreçlerinizi sorunsuz yönetmek için kapsamlı güvence sağlayın.

Base Sigorta olarak, sigortacılığı sadece bir poliçe satışı olarak görmüyoruz. Müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarını doğru analiz ederek en uygun çözümleri sunuyor, hasar süreçlerinde yanlarında oluyoruz. Teknolojiyi etkin bir şekilde kullanarak, sigorta süreçlerini hızlı, şeffaf ve erişilebilir hale getiriyoruz.

Güçlü İş Ortaklarımız, Avantajlı Poliçeler

Türkiye’nin önde gelen sigorta şirketleriyle yaptığımız stratejik iş birlikleri sayesinde, en geniş teminatlarla en uygun fiyat avantajını sunuyoruz. 

Müşterilerimizin her ihtiyacına özel poliçeler hazırlıyor, en güvenilir sigorta çözümlerini sağlıyoruz. 

Siz de Base Sigorta’nın ayrıcalıklı dünyasına katılın, geleceğinizi güvence altına alın!

Toutefois, la souscription d'un contrat, le plus large et complet soit-il, ne révèle sa valeur qu'à la survenance et au règlement d'un sinistre.  C'est là que notre rôle de courtier indépendant prend tout son sens.  Grâce à notre expérience et à notre connaissance du marché, nous sommes à vos côtés lors des expertises et procédures juridiques, ce qui consitue une indéniable plus-value par rapport aux autres réseaux de distribution.

Nous évoluons aussi avec les nouvelles technologies en vous proposant des outils de communication rapides et pratiques pour nous joindre, gérer vos assurances ou régler vos sinistres dans le plus grand confort, 24h/24.

Enfin, la loi impose un service de qualité minimum à l'ensemble de la profession, mais certains courtiers ont choisi d'aller encore plus loin.  C'est le cas des Assurances Brankart qui ont obtenu le label "Brocom".  Avec ce label, nous vous garantissons de toujours répondre à des exigences de qualité très strictes, pour encore mieux vous servir.

Name: Comparify.au
Description:
At Comparify, we're not just your average health insurance comparator. We're the matchmakers of the private health policy world, dedicated to finding the perfect insurance fit for you. Think of us as your trusted health insurance wingmen (and women), here to navigate the complex world of policies, paperwork, and premium perks, all while adding a touch of wit to the process.
With our expert team of Advisors, we dive into the vast minefield of health insurance policies, diligently sifting through all of the information to find the hidden gems tailored to your exact wants and needs. We believe that no two individuals are alike, and neither should their health coverage be. So, whether you're a thrill-seeker in need of adventurous coverage or a wellness enthusiast seeking holistic care, we've got you covered.
But our commitment doesn't stop at simply finding you the best policy. We take pride in going the extra mile to ensure you're getting the ultimate bang for your buck. We'll crunch the numbers, analyse the fine print, and unleash our expertise to make sure you're not just insured but feeling financially confident too. After all, health is priceless, but your peace of mind shouldn't come with an exorbitant price tag.
Once you've chosen your dream policy, our ongoing support kicks in. Think of us as your personal health concierge, available at your call whenever your circumstances change. We'll be your trusted advisors, offering guidance and insights as you navigate life's twists and turns. While you sit back, relax, and focus on what matters most—your well-being—we'll handle the mundane paperwork, because who needs extra stress when your health is on the line?
So, let's embark on this insurance adventure together, where we'll find your perfect health policy match made in heaven. Leave the legwork to us, and rest assured that with Comparify by your side, your health and happiness are in excellent hands.

Sigorta ihtiyaçlarınızı belirlemek ve en uygun sigorta ürünlerini seçmek için müşterilerimizle işbirliği yaparız. Her adımda, müşterilerimize şeffaflık ve dürüstlük ilkesiyle hareket ederiz.
 
Ekibimizdeki uzmanlar, sigorta sektöründeki güncel gelişmeleri ve yenilikleri takip eder. Bu sayede müşterilerimize en son ürünleri ve en iyi sigorta kapsamını sunabiliriz. Sigorta süreçlerindeki karmaşıklığı en aza indirmek ve müşterilerimizin anlaması kolay bir deneyim yaşamasını sağlamak için gelişmiş teknoloji ve araçlar kullanıyoruz.
 
Güvenilirlik, saygı ve etik değerlere olan bağlılığımızı koruyoruz. Müşterilerimize karşı dürüstlük ilkesini benimser ve her zaman adil ve doğru bilgiler sunarız. Veri gizliliğine önem verir ve müşteri bilgilerini en üst düzeyde korumak için gerekli güvenlik önlemlerini alırız.
 
Sigorta Acente Firması olarak, müşterilerimize hayat sigortası, sağlık sigortası, araç sigortası, konut sigortası, işyeri sigortası ve daha fazlası gibi geniş bir sigorta ürün yelpazesi sunmaktayız. Her bir müşterinin ihtiyaçlarına göre özelleştirilmiş çözümler sunarak, onları beklenmedik risklere karşı korumayı hedefliyoruz.
 
Siz de güvenilir ve profesyonel bir sigorta acente firmasıyla çalışmak isterseniz, size en iyi hizmeti sunmak için buradayız. Ekibimizle iletişime geçmek veya sigorta ihtiyaçlarınız hakkında daha fazla bilgi almak için bize ulaşın."

Motivation:
 - Jeff is passionate about helping people obtain crucial retirement coverage. His educational program, “Jeff’s Notes,” thoroughly explains the “What”, Why" and “How” of long-term care insurance. The mission is to ensure that no family has to go through the pain of losing their home and assets, in order to cover long-term care costs, as he witnessed his family live through. 

Industry Experience:
 - With nearly a decade of experience in the industry, Jeff has worked with some of the nation’s top financial advisors, insurance agents, CPAs, CFPs, and Estate Planning Attorneys. He has earned the nickname “The Most Successful Wholesale Marketer of Hybrid LTC” due to his extensive work with these professionals. 
Jeff has also partnered with Roy Snarr Retirement Solutions & Snarr Agent Academy to help run the Long-Term Care division, which assists thousands of agents and clients annually.  

Commitment:
 - We take it personally when we directly help families navigate the landscape of LTC and other insurance solutions to preserve & protect their financial nest eggs. Sadly, many families come to us after it's too late. They are losing everything they worked for because no one ever educated them about the importance of LTC coverage and how it fits into a COMPLETE portfolio.
 
Significance:
 - Cornerstone Legacy Partner's will always take to heart serving the families and the professionals we consult on LTC, Annuities, Life & Disability.

The sad truth is, only about 7% of people over the age of 50 own an LTC policy, leaving the rest completely exposed to a potential life altering expense. 

"If you haven't allocated something for Long Term Care expenses, you've allocated EVERYTHING for it".

Our clients come to us for policy architecture, premium financing on eight and nine figure coverages, second-opinion audits of underperforming policies, and the kind of coordination between attorneys, CPAs, and investment teams that most advisors talk about but rarely execute.
What sets us apart: we stress-test every recommendation, document assumptions your advisors will approve, and never earn a dollar until the strategy works for your balance sheet, not ours. Legato Sigorta; Tüm Mal / Hizmet sigortacılığı branşlarında ve Hayat / Bireysel Emeklilik branşlarında tam yetkili acentedir.

Çok uluslu sigorta şirketlerinde 15 yılı aşkın süreyi aşan mesleki deneyimimizi ve bilgi birikimimizi, şirketimize ve kadrolarımıza aktarmak yoluyla, sektörümüzün kurumsal kültüründeki gelişimine hizmet etmeye devam etmekteyiz.

Founded in 1896 by Charles Potter Walker, the business was principally set up

Mohan Reddy, Chief of Pediatric Cardiothoracic Surgery at UCSF for the purposes of fighting pediatric congenital heart disease.

Name: Chambre Monégasque de l'Assurance - CMA
Description:
Créée en 1950, la Chambre Monégasque de l'Assurance a pour mission principale de représenter et de défendre les intérêts économiques et professionnels de ses membres, les agents généraux et courtiers en assurance de Monaco.

La CMA s’attache à faire respecter la réglementation en vigueur. 

Elle œuvre  en faveur du respect de la déontologie et pour une reconnaissance accrue de la profession.

Dans le cadre de Commissions internes, elle travaille sur des sujets spécifiques à la profession, exemple les Accidents du Travail.

En parallèle, elle procède à l’analyse et à l’application de dispositions contribuant à faire évoluer favorablement la profession, et de facto à fournir un meilleur service aux clients assurés et assurables.

Elle demeure particulièrement vigilante quant à l’évolution des dispositions ou des lois françaises qui peuvent par le biais du Code des Assurances Français, et sous certaines conditions, venir impacter les dispositions des contrats concernant les assurés de la Principauté.

Affiliée à la FEDEM et membre de la FMBA (Fédération Méditerranéenne des Brokers d’Assurance), la CMA favorise ainsi les interactions et les synergies entre les professionnels du bassin méditerranéen.

La Chambre Monégasque de l’Assurance est par ailleurs un lieu d’échanges entre les professionnels du secteur en Principauté.

Elle regroupe aujourd'hui plus d'une trentaine de membres.

Name: Besser vorsorgen. Für weniger Sorgen.
Description:
Für manche Dinge ist es im Leben irgendwann einfach zu spät. 

Anschnallen, nachdem du bereits durch die Windschutzscheibe geflogen bist? Deinen Regenschirm öffnen, obwohl der Regen dich längst klatschnass zurückgelassen hat? Einen Feuerlöscher kaufen, wenn deine Wohnung schon abgefackelt ist?

Too little, too late, ne?

Es geht aber auch einfacher. Und ich zeige dir gerne, wie. Für ein entspannteres Leben gilt:

Besser vorsorgen. Für weniger Sorgen.

Wie genau das für dich ausschaut, was es kostest und vieles mehr erfährst du in einem persönlichen Gespräch mit mir. Schnappe dir am besten jetzt hier deinen Wunschtermin – bevor es jemand anderes macht.

Name: Powers Insurance Solutions
Description:
Powers Insurance Solutions offers a breadth of Medicare insurance plans through a variety of carriers in your area.

Our experienced Medicare agents are helpful. and thoughtful. At Powers Insurance Solutions, we want to empower you to make the best Medicare decisions and improve your wellness by educating you about your options for Medicare coverage.

The Medicare experts at Powers Insurance Solutions can answer your Medicare questions whether you want to know about available plans in your area, cost, prescription drug coverage, in-network doctors and facilities, and much more.

What's even better is that our Medicare insurance agents are here for you every day throughout the year, not just during the annual enrollment period. You can call us any time at no cost to you to get the Medicare answers you need.

Powers Insurance Solutions offers a plethora of Medicare insurance plans including:

~Original Medicare (Medicare Part A and Part B)
~Medicare Advantage (Medicare Part C)
~Special Needs Plans (SNPs) for those who qualify
~Prescription Drug Plans (Medicare Part D)
~Medicare Plans for Veterans
~Medigap

Whatever your healthcare circumstances and your budget, we will work to find you the best Medicare coverage possible in your area in Arizona at the most affordable rate.

If you're ready to learn more, visit Powers Insurance Solutions at https://powersinsurancesolutions.com/ or call (480) 719-9400 or TTY: 711. By calling this number, you will reach a licensed insurance agent.

*Note: By calling the phone number above, you will reach a licensed Medicare insurance agent. Powers Insurance Solutions is not affiliated with or endorsed by the government or federal Medicare program.

*We do not offer every plan available in your area. Currently, we represent 14 organizations that offer 91 products in your area. Please contact Medicare.gov, 1(800) MEDICARE, or your local State Health Insurance Program (SHIP) to get information on all of your options.

Name: Izem Expat
Description:
Chez Izem Expat, on ne vous propose pas seulement une assurance santé : on vous accompagne dans votre vie à l’étranger.

Nous savons ce que cela signifie de s’expatrier : les démarches, les doutes, les imprévus… parce que nous les avons vécus nous-mêmes. C’est cette expérience personnelle qui fait notre force :

	•	une expertise concrète,
	•	des solutions adaptées à la réalité des expatriés,
	•	un accompagnement humain, avant, pendant et après le départ.

Notre équipe est composée d’anciens expatriés et de spécialistes de l’assurance santé internationale. Après avoir accompagné des centaines de Français aux quatre coins du monde dans le choix de leur couverture, nous avons voulu créer une approche différente : 
plus simple, plus claire, et vraiment centrée sur vos besoins.

Que vous partiez seul, en couple, en famille ou en mission professionnelle, nous trouvons la formule qui protège réellement votre santé, partout dans le monde.

Nos engagements :

 Des conseils clairs, sans jargon
 Des solutions sur-mesure, adaptées à chaque profil
 Une équipe à l’écoute, qui connaît le terrain
 Un suivi personnalisé, avant et après votre installation

Izem Expat, c’est un courtier en assurance santé internationale conçue par des expatriés, pour les expatriés.

Our goal is to provide certainty and peace of mind to all our customers through the mitigation and handling of risk.

Avoca is a proud contributor to the community, and upholds a commitment to a triple bottom line framework that emphasizes the importance of “People, Planet, and Profit.”

We are major sponsors of The Cycling Development Foundation Inc (CDF).  CDF is a not-for-profit incorporated Association created to provide a proven pathway for aspiring young people that wish to engage in cycling as a means of developing life skills and even a professional athlete status. 

Avoca are also long term supporters of the “Hawaiian Ride for Youth” a 700km ride from Albany to Perth.
Hawaiian Ride for Youth raises funds for Youth Focus, a local charity committed to the prevention of youth suicide, depression and self-harm. This cause is very special to our director Charles Elders who has been participating in the ride since it was founded and completed 18 rides since! In 2025, we mark 20 years of business and partnership with Youth Focus!

Name: Ohio Chamber Insurance Agency
Description:
The Ohio Chamber Insurance Agency (OCIA) is a full-service employee benefits brokerage proudly owned by the Ohio Chamber of Commerce. We help Ohio employers—from startups to large manufacturers—navigate the complex benefits landscape by representing a broad network of carriers and funding solutions.

OCIA offers fully insured, level-funded, self-funded and captive plans; ancillary and voluntary benefits; benefits administration technology; payroll & HR services; workers' compensation consulting; property & casualty referrals; and individual & ICHRA support.

We also provide access to the Chamber Health Benefit Program (MEWA) for eligible small employers, but we are not limited to that program. By partnering with OCIA, you receive local, consultative service and support the Chamber's mission to advance Ohio business.

Our featured partners include UnitedHealthcare, Delta Dental, MetLife, Nationwide Pet Insurance, Employee Navigator, Sedgwick and Book + Street, among many others.

Name: quadmed AG
Description:
Welcome to quadmed AG, the insurance intermediary company that provides coverage for post-operative complications following surgical procedures. We are here to protect your health and well-being, putting your individual needs at the forefront.

Since our establishment in 1998 as a German consulting company, quadmed AG has become synonymous with competent and personalized consultancy in the healthcare sector. In 2015, we changed our name to AG and relocated our headquarters to Liechtenstein to better reflect our international orientation. This decision has enabled us to extend our services not only within the European Economic Area (EEA) but also beyond its borders, including Switzerland.

quadmed AG comprises four areas of expertise: managerial consultancy, special risk protection, project management, and global social commitment. These strengths allow us to tackle a wide range of challenges in the healthcare industry and provide tailor-made solutions for our clients.

Whether you are a physician starting your own practice, planning a succession for a medical office, in need of risk insurance for medical professionals, or involved in establishing a comprehensive healthcare center or hospital merger, quadmed AG is your reliable resource. We offer all the expertise you need for your long-term economic success, from a single source. Thanks to our history, our renowned clients primarily come from Germany, Liechtenstein, and Austria, but increasingly from Switzerland, Italy, Spain, and France.

We strive to make our text attractive and engaging for a social media profile, capturing the essence of quadmed AG's expertise and commitment to providing comprehensive insurance protection for post-operative complications. Our goal is to assure potential customers of our competence, reliability, and dedication to their well-being and peace of mind.

Name: WeCare Media
Description:
We are a performance-focused company actively buying high-quality inbound calls and transfers across Medicare, ACA, Auto, and Final Expense (FE) verticals. Our mission is to partner with trusted agencies, publishers, and networks that can deliver compliant, conversion-ready traffic at scale.

We place compliance and transparency at the core of every partnership. All traffic we buy must be TCPA compliant, DNC scrubbed, and backed by certifications like Jornaya and TrustedForm. We value long-term relationships built on trust, clear communication, and sustainable delivery.

Our buying approach is scalable and flexible — whether you can provide steady daily call volumes or burst campaigns during peak enrollment periods, we are positioned to accommodate and optimize. We operate across multiple pricing models (Pay-per-Call, CPA, or hybrid) and ensure fast payments with clear reporting, giving our partners confidence and stability.

While our primary focus is on buying, we also maintain the capability to sell quality Medicare, ACA, Auto, and FE calls and transfers, creating opportunities for mutually beneficial exchanges with our partners.

With dedicated account managers, real-time monitoring, and a commitment to compliance, we aim to be more than just a buyer — we strive to be a trusted partner who values your traffic, ensures smooth onboarding, and scales campaigns responsibly.

If you’re generating quality calls and looking for a reliable buyer, we’d be glad to explore collaboration and grow together.

Whether your team is part-time, seasonal, temporary, or contracted, they can qualify based on income, not hours.
This approach makes a measurable difference for organizations in:

-Staffing and recruiting

 We're proud to view each partnership as personal.

When you call, you’ll reach our president directly…there are no menus, no automated systems, no customer support loops. Just real answers, fast.

Of het nu gaat om het beschermen van je gezin, je woning, of je toekomstplannen – bij ons ben je aan het juiste adres voor verzekeringen op maat en betrouwbare beleggingsoplossingen.

Verzekeren- Bij Eversure begrijpen we dat verzekeren niet zomaar om producten draait, maar om mensen en hun veiligheid. Of je nu je gezin wilt beschermen, je woning wilt beveiligen of je zaak optimaal wilt verzekeren tegen risico’s, ons ervaren team staat voor je klaar met onafhankelijk advies en persoonlijke begeleiding.

Als onafhankelijke makelaar vergelijken we polissen van verschillende verzekeraars en bieden we je steeds de beste voorwaarden voor jouw specifieke situatie. Bovendien zorgen we voor een vlotte schadeafhandeling: wij staan naast je, van het melden van de schade tot het volledig afhandelen van je dossier.

Beleggen - Bouw aan een zekere toekomst
Bij Eversure staan we voor verantwoord en duurzaam beleggen, met de zekerheid die je verwacht van een betrouwbare partner. We begrijpen dat jouw vermogen het resultaat is van jarenlang hard werken en dat je je financiële toekomst in goede handen wilt leggen.

Daarom richten we ons op beleggingen met laag risico en een stabiel rendement, perfect voor wie op zoek is naar veilige, goed doordachte oplossingen.

Wil je meer weten over onze verzekeringen of beleggingsmogelijkheden?

Neem contact met ons op voor een vrijblijvend gesprek – wij helpen je graag verder.

Name: Spelsberg Assekuranzmakler
Description:
Hey, ich bin Patrick von Spelsberg Assekuranzmakler, und ich bin überzeugt, dass die wirkungsvolle Verbindung von Vermögensumwandlung und Unternehmensabsicherung oft zu herausragenden Synergien führt.

 Über mich: Als Versicherungsmakler mit Expertise in der Absicherung von Unternehmern und Unternehmen beschäftige ich mich intensiv mit der Gestaltung nachhaltiger Unternehmensstrategien. Meine Überzeugung ist, dass die Synergien zwischen der Umwandlung von Firmenvermögen und der idealen Absicherung des Unternehmens echte Win-win-Situationen schaffen können.

 Warum vernetzen? Ich glaube, dass der Austausch von Ideen und Erfahrungen uns ermöglicht, Potenziale zu entfalten und voneinander zu profitieren. Deshalb lade ich dich herzlich ein, dich mit mir zu vernetzen. Wir können gemeinsam über mögliche Synergien sprechen und Wege finden, wie unsere Unternehmen voneinander profitieren können.

 Wieso gerade ich? Meine berufliche Reise hat mich gelehrt, dass erfolgreiche Partnerschaften auf Vertrauen, Zusammenarbeit und einem gemeinsamen Streben nach Erfolg basieren. Wenn du nach einem Partner suchst, der nicht nur die Herausforderungen der Umwandlung von Firmenvermögen und Unternehmensabsicherung versteht, sondern auch aktiv nach Synergien sucht, dann bin ich genau der richtige Ansprechpartner für dich.

 Lass uns vernetzen! Ich freue mich darauf, mehr über deine Perspektiven zu erfahren und zu besprechen, wie wir gemeinsam Synergien schaffen können, um unsere Unternehmen voranzubringen. Schicke mir gerne eine Einladung, und lass uns einen inspirierenden Dialog beginnen!

Name: Future Assurance, Inc.
Description:
I’m Ken Prevett, CFP. Founder and CEO of Future Assurance Inc. An Insurance Marketing Organization based out of Kentucky and custom built to empower agents to be successful. We have 90+ insurance companies at your command and all the tools to ensure your success. If you’re looking to grow, give us a call 502-295-9500. If you just want to “look around”, call me and I’ll tell you the whole truth. Your growth is our commitment and we mean it. So be warned. We are seeking honest independent agents and agencies that would enjoy being treated fairly and with respect. Look no further! Ken@futureassurance.org 
Everyone has carriers. Everyone has products. Beyond those two resources, what do you need? Future Assurance has leveraged our more than 15 years in the insurance industry to develop online tools geared for today's and tomorrow's independent agencies and agents. Do you have an online presence? Do you have mobile quoting tools? What about social media? CRM platform to track business? FUTURE ASSURANCE has those resources and more!
Best of Both Worlds
Annuity and life insurance agencies select Future Assurance as their marketing distribution partner to leverage our strengths which include: access to multiple annuity and life insurance products through our 90+ carrier relationships; web-based sales tools and online contracting system; and a well-trained staff providing support for all of your sales efforts.
FUTURE ASSURANCE serves as the direct conduit between insurance carriers and agencies. With a carrier outsourcing their distribution to FUTURE ASSURANCE, they can focus more on developing quality products to keep you competitive with the current market conditions.
While most marketing organizations focus solely on either annuity or life insurance, we do it all. 502-205-9500

Name: 3SLCOURTAGE
Description:
3SL COURTAGE, c’est un cabinet de courtage en assurance. 
Mais au fait, c’est quoi un courtier ???

Le courtier en assurance est un intermédiaire entre les assurés et les compagnies d’assurance. 
Il a pour mission de conseiller, proposer et mettre en place des contrats d’assurance pour ses clients en se basant sur une analyse de leurs besoins et exigences. 

Les 3 forces motrices :
1. Accompagnement complet « Aller plus loin que vous proposer des solutions d’assurance : vous accompagner tout au long de la vie de vos contrats : suivi régulier, réévaluation de vos besoins, conseils en optimisation fiscale et en gestion de patrimoine. »
2. «Prendre le temps de comprendre vos besoins avant de vous proposer des solutions adaptées. Nous nous engageons à vous offrir un service personnalisé et de qualité. » 
3. « En tant que courtier indépendant, nous avons une liberté totale dans le choix des compagnies et des produits que nous vous proposons. Notre seul objectif est de vous trouver les meilleures solutions, sans influence extérieure. »

Name: Facil Expert
Description:
A Fácil Expert não é apenas uma corretora de seguros; é uma parceira comprometida com o bem-estar, a prosperidade e a segurança de seus clientes, oferecendo uma abordagem holística que abrange não só a proteção financeira, mas também a promoção de uma vida saudável e plena.

Proteção em Todas as Etapas da Vida: A Fácil Expert se compromete a oferecer soluções de seguros que acompanham você, sua família e sua empresa ao longo de toda a jornada de vida, garantindo proteção e segurança em momentos cruciais.

Consultoria Personalizada: Cada cliente é único, e é com essa premissa que a Fácil Expert oferece consultoria personalizada, entendendo as necessidades específicas de cada um para propor soluções de seguros sob medida.

Tradição e Cuidado com o Futuro: Com uma forte tradição no mercado de seguros, a Fácil Expert se posiciona como uma parceira no cuidado com o futuro, promovendo a importância da prevenção e do planejamento financeiro para uma vida mais tranquila e segura.

Longevidade e Saúde Integral: A corretora vai além do conceito tradicional de seguros, abraçando a ideia de longevidade e saúde integral. Isso significa promover não apenas a proteção financeira, mas também o bem-estar físico e mental de seus clientes.

Prosperidade e Segurança: O objetivo maior é assegurar um futuro próspero e seguro para os clientes e seus familiares, através de soluções de seguros que protejam contra imprevistos e contribuam para a construção de um legado sólido.

Educação e Informação: A Fácil Expert se compromete a ser uma fonte de dicas e informações valiosas, auxiliando os clientes em sua jornada de segurança, com conteúdos que orientam e esclarecem dúvidas sobre seguros e planejamento financeiro.

Navegação Segura: A Fácil Expert convida seus clientes a "traçar a rota e navegar seguro", enfatizando a importância de estar bem assessorado em questões de seguros para enfrentar com tranquilidade as incertezas da vida.

Name: I Care Insurance Agency LLC
Description:
My name is Simon Dyson, and I’ve been providing customized employee benefit packages for businesses for over 10 years. On January 2nd, 2024, I made the decision to leave the corporate insurance world and start my own agency. I did this for personal reasons that align with my deep passion for helping businesses like yours, and more importantly, your greatest asset—your employees and their families.

I am the primary caregiver for my 22-year-old son, Billy, who has special needs. Owning my own business gives me the flexibility to care for him while offering you the personal, customized service you deserve—without the constraints of corporate expectations. Now, I set the expectations, and my goal is to educate small business owners and their employees about the often-overwhelming and confusing world of medical insurance. My focus is on education, not sales, so that you and your employees can make informed decisions about their benefits.

I specialize in providing a wide range of benefits, including Medical, Life, Short-Term Disability, Long-Term Disability, Dental, Vision, Accident, Critical Illness, and Hospital Indemnity insurance. These solutions are designed to protect both small businesses and individuals, giving you and your employees the peace of mind that comes with comprehensive coverage.

I chose to focus specifically on small businesses because I believe you’re often overlooked. Many agencies don’t prioritize small businesses, and the cost of doing business with you is sometimes deemed too high. But I do care about you, your employees, and their families. You won’t get a 1-800 number from me—you’ll have my personal cell phone number, and I encourage you and your employees to reach out with any questions or concerns.

I look forward to building a meaningful relationship and helping you navigate the world of employee benefits to ensure your employees are protected.

Name: Fde Palma
Description:
Fde Palma
Siamo una realtà specializzata nella consulenza assicurativa e finanziaria, con un focus su soluzioni personalizzate per proteggere le persone, le famiglie e le imprese.

La nostra missione è aiutare i clienti a costruire un futuro sicuro e sereno attraverso una pianificazione strategica e prodotti innovativi.

Ci occupiamo di:

-Protezione personale: Coperture per infortuni, invalidità, prematura scomparsa e non autosufficienza.
-Pianificazione finanziaria: Soluzioni assicurative per risparmio, investimento e previdenza.
-Servizi per PMI: Protezione su misura per piccole e medie imprese, con una particolare attenzione alla gestione dei rischi e alla continuità aziendale.
-Noleggio a lungo termine (NLT): Consulenza e vendita di soluzioni per il noleggio a lungo termine, ideali per privati e aziende.
-Servizi luce e gas: Offriamo consulenza dedicata e soluzioni convenienti per la fornitura di energia e gas, con un focus su risparmio e trasparenza.

Analyse patrimoniale globale : pour établir une stratégie adaptée à vos objectifs.

Investissements : allocation d’actifs performante et diversifiée.

 2. Solutions d’Assurance (Individuelle & Collective)
 Assurance pour les particuliers :
Assurance-vie : outils de placement et de protection patrimoniale.

Prévoyance individuelle : couverture des aléas de la vie (décès, invalidité, arrêt de travail).

Complémentaire santé : couverture sur mesure selon vos besoins (hospitalisation, optique, dentaire…).

Habitation, responsabilité civile & multirisque : protection de vos biens et de vos proches.

 Solutions collectives pour les entreprises & indépendants :
Prévoyance collective : protection sociale de vos salariés (décès, incapacité, invalidité).

Complémentaire santé collective : mise en conformité avec les obligations légales et adaptation aux besoins spécifiques de vos équipes.

Épargne salariale (PEE / PER Collectif) : fidélisation et motivation des collaborateurs à travers des dispositifs d’épargne attractifs.

Accompagnement dirigeant : couverture spécifique pour les chefs d’entreprise (statut TNS, mandataire, holding…).

Name: Veterinary Insurance Services Company
Description:

A key reason for the success of this insurance program has been active participation by the CVMA in advising insurance carriers and brokers on the unique coverage and service needs of its members.

In 2007, the CVMA formed a wholly-owned subsidiary insurance brokerage. In doing so, the CVMA could better ensure the expansion of insurance products and superior service delivery to its membership. Name: Elrod Financial
Description:
At Elrod Financial Group, we're more than just an independent Life & Health Insurance Agency—we're your dedicated partners in building a secure future. Based in the heart of San Antonio, Texas, we serve individuals, families, and small businesses nationwide with innovative, personalized solutions designed to protect what matters most. By collaborating with top-rated carriers across the country, we deliver competitive, comprehensive coverage that fits your unique needs, ensuring peace of mind at every life stage.
Our expertise spans a wide array of services, starting with life insurance options like term life for short-term protection, whole life for lifelong security with cash value growth, and Indexed Universal Life (IUL) policies that offer flexible premiums linked to market performance—ideal for retirement planning or college savings. We also specialize in disability income coverage to safeguard your earnings during illness or injury, final expense policies for dignified end-of-life arrangements, and mortgage protection to preserve your home in times of crisis. On the health side, we offer affordable plans that include dental, vision, critical illness riders, Medigap supplements, and group coverage for businesses. Whether you're planning for college funds through tax-advantaged life insurance or securing retirement with annuities for steady, tax-deferred income, our team crafts strategies that maximize benefits while minimizing costs.
Founded on a client-first philosophy, our mission is simple: to prioritize your family and future with unparalleled protection. We value long-term relationships built on trust, compassion, and understanding, offering free, no-obligation consultations to assess your situation and guide you through the seamless application process. Led by experienced professionals, our team embodies servant leadership, providing thorough analyses and ongoing support—even for those with health challenges through guaranteed acceptance options.

Visiomme on olla asiakkaista ja henkilöstöstä välittävä, uudistuva, sekä turvallinen ja vastuullinen yritys. Missionamme on tarjota vakuutus- ja vahinkoasioiden hoitopalveluita vastuullisesti ja kestävästi. Yrityksemme arvoja ovat vastuullisuus, luotettavuus, tasapuolisuus ja rehellisyys.

Yrityksemme tehtävänä on etsiä vakuutusmarkkinoilta asiakasyrityksellemme mahdollisimman kattava vakuutusturva kustannustehokkaaseen hintaan. Vakuutusmeklari toimii aina asiakkaansa toimeksiannosta. Toimeksiantosopimuksesta käy selville, mitä asiakas ja vakuutusmeklari ovat sopineet. Sopimuksen lisäksi asiakas antaa vakuutusmeklarille valtakirjan, jolla vakuutusmeklari voi edustaa asiakasta vakuutusasioissa.

Vakuutusmeklariksi rekisteröitävällä on oltava vakuutusmeklaritutkinnolla osoitettu ammattipätevyys. Vakuutusmeklaritutkinnon suorittanut henkilö on merkitty Finanssivalvonnan ylläpitämään vakuutusedustajarekisteriin. Vakuutusmeklarin toimintaa valvoo Finanssivalvonta.

Name: Ecco Agency Inc
Description:
Michael J. Fleischer, the President of Ecco Agency, Inc., is a second-generation insurance professional and has been in the insurance industry for over forty years. Throughout his career, Michael has worked in many facets of the insurance industry, Wholesale, Retail, MGA, and Carrier. Ecco Agency, Inc. is a boutique insurance firm with a reputation of being extremely knowledgeable of the products that they sell and utilizing a creative approach to write complicated accounts.  

Michael Fleischer is also the President of Flexible Agency Inc, a wholesale insurance firm. Prior to restarting Flexible Agency, Inc. in 2003, Michael Fleischer ran a successful Wholesale and Excess & Surplus Lines brokerage for nearly twelve (12) years, which he sold 1999 to dedicate his energies to start a Managing General Agency.

Michael, utilizing his entrepreneurial spirit, extensive industry contacts, and market knowledge purchased Ecco Agency, Inc. as a retail insurance firm to complement the wholesale insurance products offered by Flexible Agency, Inc.. Mike, being part of the respected Fleischer family insurance dynasty, tapped into his networks, friendships, and relationships that, in many cases go back decades and relaunched Ecco Agency, Inc. as a boutique General Agency and quickly gained a reputation for product knowledge and being able to make difficult placements due to his creativity and expertise.

Ecco Agency, Inc. is located at 12 Little Neck Road, Suite 202, Centerport, NY 11721. 

You can reach us at 631-754-0562 or via email at MichaelF@eccoagency.com.

Additionally, we help clients make informed decisions about potential life events such as living longer, passing away, or becoming permanently disabled. Sabemos que não podemos prever o futuro, mas podemos nos preparar para ele utilizando o seguro como ferramenta para amenizar perdas inesperadas. Naš fokus je na dugoročnim partnerskim odnosima, razumevanju potreba klijenata i zaštiti njihovih ličnih i poslovnih interesa. 

Posvećenost, visok nivo profesionalnosti i etičnosti, uz kontinuirano unapređenje znanja, omogućavaju svakom našem klijentu da bude adekvatno osiguran, siguran i bezbrižan.

Name: AXA GARAU GRUP
Description:
GARAU ASESORIA SOCIEDAD DE AGENCIA DE SEGUROS, S.L. es una Sociedad de Agencia de Seguros, con una trayectoria profesional iniciada como persona física en 1959 por su fundador Miguel Garau Ramis, y que en 1997 pasó a Sociedad Limitada. En 2003 fue nombrada Agencia General de AXA Seguros, máximo galardón que se otorga en la estructura de la distribución mediada, por su volumen de cartera y su excelencia en la gestión de la misma. En el año 2011 abrió su segunda oficina en la localidad de Maria de la Salut, en el 2015 su tercer punto de venta en Esporles, y en el año 2022 la cuarta en Santa María del Camí. 

El equipo humano, compuesto por una plantilla flexible entre 12-14 personas altamente cualificadas para las tareas comerciales, soporte y especialización de los seguros de todos los ramos que comercializa AXA en sus cuatro vertientes: Retail, Salud, Ahorro-Inversión y Empresas.

En la actualidad, la empresa dispone de los 4 grados que otorga Axa a las oficinas que profesionalmente desarrollan la más experta especialización: Vida, Salud, Empresas y Previsión Social Colectiva, lo que garantiza los principales pilares de un buen asesoramiento a los clientes bajo los estándares de calidad de AXA, líder mundial en protección de patrimonio y gestión de activos.

Name: RDS Assurances
Description:
Le cabinet d’assurance RDS est né de la reprise par deux associés d'un cabinet historique AXA fondé en 1953 à Montoire sur le Loir par la Famille Proust. 
Les deux associés Romain RATIER et Damien DA SILVA ont décidé de regrouper leurs compétences et leurs expériences afin d’en reprendre la direction en 2017 avec l'objectif d'y insuffler une dynamique d'accompagnement et de conseil premium via une expérience client unique.
 
Depuis plus de 70 ans, Grâce à notre réseau privilégié, RDS Assurances offre à ses clients l'accès aux meilleures solutions d’assurances et de placements financiers du marché, permettant de répondre aux besoins spécifiques de chacun dans l'objectif de les accompagner au mieux dans leur développement, assurant ainsi leur succès et leur sérénité.  
 
RDS Assurances, est un cabinet spécialiste de l'assurabilité des Entreprises en Risques Techniques et Risques Complexes depuis 1953. 

Nous intervenons en tant que spécialiste sur 5 domaines métiers : L'industrie, Le transport-logistique, Les Franchisés, Les professions Réglementées, L'Agricoles-Viticoles.

Grâce à notre organisation, nous offrons à chaque client un accompagnement sur-mesure d'une qualité inégalée, intégrant pleinement les spécificités techniques et légales de leur métier.
 
RDS Assurances, c'est une équipe de 9 personnes internes et externes, tous spécialistes de leur marché.
RDS Assurances, c'est la protection de plus de 1500 clients partout en France.

Nos équipes s'investissent avec une détermination absolue pour garantir à chaque client un service d'excellence, répondant à leurs besoins les plus exigeants. Chaque jour, nous mettons un point d’honneur à nous surpasser pour nos clients.
 
Ensemble élaborons une relation de confiance sur le long terme pour vous permettre d'atteindre vos objectifs, même les plus ambitieux.
 
RDS Assurances, L'assurance de votre Résultat.
Nos liens avec AXA sont régis par un mandat d’agents généraux.

Description:
Apollo Insurer to nowoczesna multiagencja ubezpieczeniowa, która łączy doświadczenie z indywidualnym podejściem i pełnym zaangażowaniem w ochronę tego, co dla naszych klientów najcenniejsze: zdrowia, życia, majątku i przyszłości.
Działamy w oparciu o przejrzyste wartości – zaufanie, odpowiedzialność i profesjonalizm – bo wierzymy, że ubezpieczenia to nie tylko dokumenty, ale przede wszystkim realne wsparcie w kluczowych momentach życia i działalności biznesowej.

Obsługujemy zarówno osoby prywatne, jak i firmy – od jednoosobowych działalności, przez lokalne przedsiębiorstwa, po większe organizacje. Oferujemy szeroki wachlarz rozwiązań: od ubezpieczeń komunikacyjnych, przez majątkowe, życiowe, zdrowotne i podróżne, po zaawansowane programy dla firm (m.in. grupowe ubezpieczenia pracownicze, OC zawodowe, ubezpieczenia flotowe czy specjalistyczne pakiety branżowe).

Naszą misją jest nie tylko sprzedaż polis, ale przede wszystkim dostarczanie wartości: doradzamy strategicznie, analizujemy ryzyka i proponujemy realnie dopasowane rozwiązania. Każdy klient jest inny, dlatego nie działamy szablonowo – tworzymy ubezpieczenia skrojone na miarę potrzeb.

Dzięki współpracy z wieloma renomowanymi towarzystwami ubezpieczeniowymi zapewniamy konkurencyjne oferty, szybki kontakt, sprawny proces obsługi i pełne wsparcie na każdym etapie – od pierwszej rozmowy, po zgłoszenie szkody.

Apollo Insurer to więcej niż agencja. To zespół ekspertów, którzy stawiają na relacje, jakość i długofalowe bezpieczeństwo.

Zapraszamy do współpracy – razem zadbajmy o Twoją spokojną przyszłość.

Name: La Mar de Seguro
Description:
La Mar de Seguro es la continuación a 30 años de experiencia asegurando embarcaciones y todo aquello que las rodea.

Nuestra actividad como Agencia de Seguros Marítima arrancó en 1988 en el importante puerto pesquero de la ciudad de Vigo tesón da su fundadora, Carmen Cancela, la cual desarrolló su labor de dirección y representación de una forma personal y cercana, basando el día a día de su trabajo en un pilar principal, la confianza.

Así hizo hasta el año 2008, fecha en la cual su hijo Jorge, trabajador en la empresa desde 1991, se hizo cargo de la misma, cargo que mantiene a día de hoy.

Fruto de esas décadas de experiencia, en las que la confianza personal es un valor más en nuestra empresa, se ha creado esta web, tratando que ese mismo tipo de servicio y atención se traslade a este nuevo mundo digital quizá un tanto impersonal y globalizado, pero del cual no podemos obviar sus ventajas tanto en comunicación como en simplificación. Ello sin olvidar nuestro completo conocimiento del mundo asegurador así como de las interioridades de la aseguradora a la cual representamos y con cuya Dirección mantenemos un hilo directo de comunicación.

Esperamos por tanto darle, más allá de una póliza de seguro, la seguridad y confianza que le permitan navegar tranquilo como si gestionara su póliza personalmente en nuestras oficinas.

La confianza digital existe y esperamos día a día, con nuestro trabajo, poder demostrárselo.

Nos tiene a su disposición.

Un saludo y buena navegación.

Description:
EAE Insurance Agency was born from a deeply personal place—a father’s desire to protect his family and build something meaningful for their future. With two daughters on the autism spectrum, including one who is nonverbal, I knew I needed more than just a career—I needed flexibility, purpose, and a way to be present for my kids when they needed me most.

With over a decade of experience, starting my own agency gave me the chance to do exactly that. It allowed me to be hands-on at home while also doing work I care about: helping other families and business owners protect what matters most to them. EAE is named after my children—Everly, Ava, and Easton—and my goal is to create more than just a business. I want to build a legacy they can be proud of and, one day, be part of. This agency is family-driven, community-focused, and built on the belief that doing the right thing always matters. We’re proud to support the Autistic Community and believe in reinvesting into their programs and resources.

Name: Temasis Seguros
Description:
Fundada em 1995, a TEMASIS Corretora e Administradora de Seguros Ltda. iniciou suas atividades pela então Cia. União de Seguros Gerais, como corretora exclusiva da União dos Servidores da Justiça do Rio de Janeiro (UNISERVI) e a Associação dos Oficiais de Justiça Avaliadores (AOJA).

Após  a aquisição da Cia. União de Seguros Gerais pela BRADESCO Seguros, a TEMASIS ampliou suas atividades por meio do credenciamento em outras seguradoras, e passou a atender a União Assistencial Beneficente dos Servidores Públicos (UBEP).

Ao longo dos anos, a TEMASIS se destacou com ofertas de seguros de todos os ramos, e seu dedicado apoio aos clientes na hora de escolher as opções de seguro e seguradoras mais apropriadas em cada caso. Oferecendo  preços e condições de pagamento atraentes, assistência total, e atuação eficaz para manutenção de bônus, a TEMASIS sempre busca personalizar as soluções de seguro de acordo com o perfil e necessidade de cada cliente.

Em 2022, após o contexto da pandemia do COVID-19, a TEMASIS passou a concentrar estrategicamente sua atuação nas modalidades de seguros: vida, saúde, fiança locatícia, capitalização, empresarial, residencial, condomínio e automóvel. Também colocou em ação investimentos em seus 2 projetos mais recentes: 1) PROJETO ABRANGÊNCIA: focado nas coletividades parceiras e associadas, concentrando as atividades em seguradoras preferenciais, para garantir produtividade e alta eficácia; 2) PROJETO TRANSFORMAÇÃO DIGITAL: voltado à modernização das atividades operacionais e da comunicação, para atender, com a mais alta qualidade e agilidade, as demandas do novo milênio.

A TEMASIS é a parceira certa, confiável e de excelência, preparada para te amparar e proteger o que tem valor para você. Continue contando conosco para ajudar você proteger  seu legado.

Name: Allianz Pfunt & Surchy OHG
Description:
Herzlich Willkommen bei der Allianz Pfunt & Surchy OHG
Ihr Kompass für finanzielle Sicherheit in Köln!

Stellen Sie sich vor, Sie haben einen zuverlässigen Partner an Ihrer Seite, der nicht nur Ihre Versicherungsbedürfnisse versteht, sondern auch über den Tellerrand hinausblickt, um Ihnen umfassende Finanzlösungen anzubieten. Genau das bieten wir Ihnen hier in Köln.

Unsere Agentur, mit Sitz auf der Weyerstr. 29-31, 50676 Köln, direkt am belebten Barbarossaplatz, ist nicht nur ein Ort der Versicherungen, sondern vielmehr Ihr Wegweiser durch den Dschungel der finanziellen Planung. Unter der visionären Führung von Herrn Ahmad Surchy und Herrn Wowa Pfunt vereint unser Team Fachwissen und Leidenschaft für eine ganzheitliche Betreuung.

In einer Welt, die sich ständig verändert, verstehen wir, dass Ihre finanziellen Ziele einzigartig sind. Genau deshalb setzen wir auf Individualität und persönliche Verbindung. Unsere Auszubildenden, Frau Melda Akpinar und Herr Kevin Kraus, tragen aktiv dazu bei, dass unser Team nicht nur dynamisch, sondern auch stets am Puls der Zeit ist.

Unsere Mission geht über die traditionelle Versicherungsberatung hinaus. Wir verstehen uns als Ihr Begleiter auf dem Weg zu finanzieller Freiheit. Ob im Büro oder im Außendienst – wir sind lokal für Sie da und immer bereit, Ihre Fragen zu beantworten. Durch maßgeschneiderte Versicherungsanalysen und Angebote zielen wir darauf ab, Ihre finanziellen Ziele zu erreichen und Sie bestmöglich abzusichern.

Doch das ist noch nicht alles. Wir sind stolz darauf, Ihnen nicht nur Versicherungen, sondern ein breites Spektrum an Vorsorge- und Finanzprodukten bieten zu können. Ihr Vertrauen ist unser höchstes Gut, und daher stehen wir Ihnen nicht nur in guten, sondern auch in schwierigen Zeiten zur Seite.

Eine Partnerschaft mit der Allianz Pfunt & Surchy OHG bedeutet mehr als nur Transaktionen – es bedeutet eine Verbindung, die auf Vertrauen, Engagement und langfristigem Denken basiert.

Büszkék vagyunk arra, hogy cégünk sikeresen fel tudja venni a versenyt a hazai alkuszi piacon. Több tízezer magánszemély mellett társaságunkat már több mint 200 autókereskedelmi cég és közel 100 flottás cég választotta partneréül.

Már a megalakulás pillanatában és azóta is független biztosításközvetítő vállalkozásként működünk. Ezzel is szeretnénk biztosítani, hogy Ügyfeleink számára teljes körű, költségtakarékos és testreszabott szolgáltatásokat nyújtsunk.

Además, en ISAZA Realty comprendemos la importancia de una inversión inteligente en bienes raíces. En ISAZA Realty, nos esforzamos por ofrecer un servicio de calidad excepcional. In Tiassicuro.io lavoriamo insieme al tuo obiettivo, fornendo soluzioni adatte e personalizzate per rispondere a tutte le tue esigenze assicurative, anche quelle che non sai ancora di avere. 

Cerchiamo di essere i precursori di un mondo assicurativo che possa unire le persone in una rete affidabile, che li renda consapevoli dei loro diritti.

Sigorta, hayatın belirsizlikleri nedeniyle ortaya çıkabilecek riskleri güvence altına alır.

Küreselleşme ve teknolojik gelişmelerle hızla değişen dünyamızda, insan ihtiyaçları da hızla değişmekte, beraberinde de her geçen gün riskler artmaktadır.

Gerek değişime ayak uydurmak ve gerekse risklere karşı korunmak için siz de Taron Sigorta Aracılık Hizmetleri A.Ş. ile birlikte Güvenli Yarınlara Birlikte Adım Atabilirsiniz.

Şirketimiz; bir Temelfen Şirketler Grubu iştiraki olup 20 yılı aşkın sektör deneyimine sahip ekibimizle ve ülkemizin önde gelen çözüm ortakları ile sizlere en kapsamlı ve en güvenilir sigorta hizmetlerini sunmak için her geçen gün daha fazla çalışmakta ve gelişmeye devam etmektedir.

Misyonumuz
Taron Sigorta Aracılık Hizmetleri A.Ş. olarak kaliteli hizmet ve müşteri odaklı politikamızla, sizlerin güvenli bir gelecek inşa etmenize yardımcı olmak ve sigorta süreçlerinizi kolaylaştırmaktır.

Vizyonumuz
Teknolojiyi ve uzmanlığı bir araya getirerek bir yandan sigorta ihtiyaçlarınıza en uygun çözümleri sunarken diğer yandan da sektördeki en yenilikçi ve güvenilir sigorta acentesi olmaktır.

Name: SARIFA
Description:
Sarifa is a fully digital insurance agency and comparison platform serving customers across the United States. Originally founded in Kingston, Jamaica, Sarifa pioneered the country’s first digital insurance brokerage platform—offering real-time quotes, paperless processing, and 24/7 access. After transforming the Jamaican market and earning national recognition for innovation, Sarifa entered the U.S. through the acquisition of Desert West Insurance, a long-standing family-owned agency in Arizona. In 2025, both companies officially merged and relaunched under the Sarifa brand.

With our platform, sarifa.com, customers can easily compare insurance quotes, purchase coverage online or through their preferred licensed agent, and manage all their policies from one simple dashboard.

Serious savings

Sarifa helps customers compare prices across top insurance providers so they can secure the best deal on auto, home, renters, travel, and other insurance products. We work to make coverage more affordable, transparent, and tailored to your needs.

One-stop shop

No need to visit multiple websites or make endless phone calls. With Sarifa, you can compare quotes, speak with an agent, and bind your policy—all in one place.

No fees, no hassle

We don’t charge to show you quotes. We don’t sell your personal information. And using Sarifa won’t flood your inbox or phone with unwanted spam.

Unlock discounts

Our partnerships with leading insurers allow us to offer competitive rates and access to special discounts. Whether you’re insuring a car, home, business, or planning a trip, Sarifa helps you find smart ways to save.

Get expert advice

Prefer human support? Our licensed agents are available to answer questions, guide you through quotes, and ensure your coverage truly fits your life.

Sarifa is currently licensed in 11 states: Arizona, California, Florida, Georgia, Michigan, New York, Ohio, Tennessee, Texas, Virginia and Washington.

As a leading Insurance Agency since 2023, we are committed to finding the best insurance options for you. Contact us to get a free estimate today.

Health Insurance
Health insurance packages vary widely depending on the provider and the specific plan. Here are some general statements about health insurance packages:
Coverage Types: Health insurance packages can include a range of coverage types, such as medical, dental, vision, and prescription drug coverage.
Premiums: Enrollees typically pay a monthly premium for their health insurance coverage. Premiums can vary based on factors like the level of coverage, the insurer, and the individual's or family's health.
Deductibles: Many health insurance plans have deductibles, which are the amount you must pay out of pocket before the insurance starts covering costs.
Co-Payments and Coinsurance: Health insurance packages often involve co-payments (a fixed fee per service) or coinsurance (a percentage of the cost), which you are responsible for when receiving medical services.
Networks: Insurers typically have networks of healthcare providers, and using in-network providers is usually more cost-effective than going out of network.
Preventive Care: Many health insurance plans cover preventive care services, like vaccinations and screenings, at no cost to the policyholder.
Prescription Drug Coverage: Health insurance packages can include coverage for prescription medications, with different tiers for generic and brand-name drugs.
Out-of-Pocket Maximums: Plans often have a maximum limit on the amount you'll have to pay out of pocket in a given year. Once you reach this limit, the insurance covers all eligible expenses.
